faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: Can I join BTech at Manipal University, Jaipur without JEE Mains?
faqs.answer: Yes, Manipal University conduct Manipal entrance test (MET) every year for admission in B.Tech and other UG courses. and it does not accept the score of JEE mains.You can also get admission through CUET-UG in various courses and direct entry is also available for some courses. Candidates must have to meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute for the BTech programme.

college_info.intro:
MJU Jaipur's flagship programmes are BTech, BSc & MBA course. MUJ Rajasthan offers BTech specialisation in CSE, Biotechnology, Information Technology, Automobile Engineering, Data Science, Civil Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering, Chemical Engineering, etc. BTech students can work as Web Developer, Data Science Engineer, Mechanical Engineer, etc. As per the data available on the official website, currently 14,000+ students are enrolled across all programmes. A well-qualified team of around 700 faculty members is the asset of university.
Manipal University Jaipur Campus is one of the eminent universities in the Northern India region. MBA students can seek higher education and work as Business Analysts, Finance Managers, Compliance Analysts, Market Research Analysts, Investment Bankers and others. The maximum package offered to the Engineering students in 2025 was 64 LPA. Below are some of the programmes offered by Manipal University Jaipur India and the Manipal University Jaipur fees:

placements.overview: Manipal University, Jaipur offers placement assistance to students. The university is visited by top companies for placements such as Amazon, Accenture, KPMG, Bosch, Microsoft, Deloitte, and others. The below are the Manipal University, Jaipur placement statistics for 2025:

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: My experience and review at Manipal University Jaipur as a fresher of 2025.

review_content.Placements: Around 50% of students get jobs in my batch, according to experience. Recruiting companies are Infosys, Dell, Flipkart, Amazon, and Wipro. Project manager, web developer, database manager, and many more roles are offered. The highest is 10 LPA, the lowest is 2-3 LPA, and the average is 5.5 LPA. Around 60% of students get internships in companies like Tata, Infosys, Dell, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: It is the best college according to facilities and infrastructure in all of Rajasthan. Hostels feel like a 5-star residence colony. Everything is available in hostels, hospitals, cafes, shops, parks, gym, sports facilities, and indoor games, almost everything. No need to go out of the hostels for any legal matter. They have professional cooks for the mess, and every day is something different and tasty in the mess.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Good college, self-study is important.

review_content.Placements: The college provides many opportunities through clubs, internships, competitions, and placement training, but it also depends on students whether they can grab the opportunity. Students who stay focused, work hard, and do consistent study can get the most out of these opportunities and get top placement packages. Self-study is a must.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are above average, with decent rooms, food, and basic amenities, better than those at other colleges I have seen. However, the hostel fees are also on the higher side compared to many other colleges, so it is expensive for some students. You can also apply for a student loan. College is friendly with loan documentation.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It offers supportive faculty members and a good learning environment.

review_content.Placements: There is no package in architecture, and students themselves need to approach firms they are interested in or apply for higher education. Almost everyone tends to find an appropriate job or college for a master's. The initial roles offered are junior architects, draftsmen, and designers as well.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Manipal University, Jaipur, is top-notch and rewarded with many awards as well. The campus is Griha-rated, which is also a great achievement. Facilities at the hostel are also very good. They take care of students. Their priority is students' safety and health.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Quite a good university giving average placements, great infrastructure, and vibrant culture.

review_content.Placements: There have been companies like Deloitte, Dell, Amazon, and others for recruitment, with quite a good number of students being placed. Though you gotta put in your personal efforts if you want to get into any of the good roles. There has been an average package of around 8-10 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Great and vibrant infrastructure with lots of amenities and activities. You have different messes with food that are better compared to other universities that I have known and heard of, and many facilities like a gym, sports like TT, billiards, basketball, football, and many more.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. (Hons.) in Economics - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Very good infrastructure and very good amenities.

review_content.Placements: 50 percent of students were placed last year in my course. The lowest package is 2.5 LPA, and the highest package is nearly 5 LPA. Top recruiter companies are AU Bank, SBI Bank and other finance-related companies. Almost 80 percent of students get internships. Roles are cashier, Managerial, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Every corner of our campus has Wi-Fi, and each course has its labs and a central library which has a seating capacity of nearly 500 students. The mess food is average, and the hostel amenities are good. The college has a small clinic for emergencies, and it has a ground for cricket, football, badminton, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: If you have money then only come to this college, else no need.

review_content.Placements: The placement scenario in MUJ is overall quite good. In my course, around 90–94 percent of students get placed. The highest package ranges from 80–84 LPA, and the average is 8–9 LPA. Some of the top recruiters that visited our campus include Amazon, Dell, and Deloitte.
review_content.Infrastructure: MUJ has a modern and well-planned campus. Classrooms are smart and spacious, labs are well-equipped, and the library is excellent. The hostels are clean with good facilities, and the campus has great sports grounds and a vibrant environment. Opt for hostels if you want access to more sports facilities.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees of Manipal University Jaipur for BTech?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee of the BTech programme at Manipal University ranges between INR 5.37 lakh - INR 16.40 lakh. The fee has a range because the BTech programme at Manipal Universitry Jaipur is also offered as a lateral entry programme and as this is the three-year course the tuition fee for this programme is comparatively less. The fee range mentioned above only consists the cost of tuition and does not include the mess fee or the hostel fee. The fee is taken from unofficial sources and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: What is the scope of pursuing MCA from Manipal University?
overview_faqs.answer: Students will have multiple opportunities in the Software industry after pursuing MCA from Manipal University. The curriculum of the prgramme is designed in such a way that it will impart the understanding of fundamental of computer Science that will help students to establish themseleves as Computer and IT professionals in the IT and IT Enabled service industry. Apart from this, the programme prepares students for employment in a wide spectrum industrial and business environments.A Manipal University MCA degreeholder may apply for the following profiles:Software DeveloperComputer System AnalystSoftware Engineer or ProgrammerDatabase AdministratorSoftware PublisherSoftware Application ArchitectSoftware ConsultantBusiness AnalystWeb Designer/Web DeveloperSenior Technical ConsultantProject Manager

overview_faqs.question: Is Manipal University Jaipur good for BCA?
overview_faqs.answer: The UGC recognition and A+ NAAC accreditation make this institute a perfect choice for every computer application degree aspirant. The total tuition fee for the BCA programme at Manipal University Jaipur ranges between INR 1.2 lakh - INR 4 lakh, There is a ranges in the fee because the BCA programme is also offered as a four-year programme. The expected average salary after the completion of the programme is INR 4.5 lakh. Considering the total tuition fee and the average salary this seems to be a good return on the investment.

overview_faqs.question: What is the BE/BTech fees at Manipal University Jaipur?
overview_faqs.answer: The BE/BTech fees at Manipal University Jaipur ranges between INR 4.69 Lakhs and INR 18.04 Lakhs in terms of total tuition fees and can vary depending on the chosen specialisation. The total fee structure for BE/BTech will also include admission fees, security deposit, examination fees, etc. Students may also have extra charges such as hostel fees.

Project manager, web developer, database manager, and many more roles are offered. The highest is 10 LPA, the lowest is 2-3 LPA, and the average is 5.5 LPA. Around 60% of students get internships in companies like Tata, Infosys, Dell, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: It is the best college according to facilities and infrastructure in all of Rajasthan. Hostels feel like a 5-star residence colony. Everything is available in hostels, hospitals, cafes, shops, parks, gym, sports facilities, and indoor games, almost everything. No need to go out of the hostels for any legal matter. They have professional cooks for the mess, and every day is something different and tasty in the mess.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good college, self-study is important.

content.Placements: The college provides many opportunities through clubs, internships, competitions, and placement training, but it also depends on students whether they can grab the opportunity. Students who stay focused, work hard, and do consistent study can get the most out of these opportunities and get top placement packages. Self-study is a must.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are above average, with decent rooms, food, and basic amenities, better than those at other colleges I have seen. However, the hostel fees are also on the higher side compared to many other colleges, so it is expensive for some students. You can also apply for a student loan. College is friendly with loan documentation.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It offers supportive faculty members and a good learning environment.

content.Placements: There is no package in architecture, and students themselves need to approach firms they are interested in or apply for higher education. Almost everyone tends to find an appropriate job or college for a master's. The initial roles offered are junior architects, draftsmen, and designers as well.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Manipal University, Jaipur, is top-notch and rewarded with many awards as well. The campus is Griha-rated, which is also a great achievement. Facilities at the hostel are also very good. They take care of students. Their priority is students' safety and health.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Quite a good university giving average placements, great infrastructure, and vibrant culture.

content.Placements: There have been companies like Deloitte, Dell, Amazon, and others for recruitment, with quite a good number of students being placed. Though you gotta put in your personal efforts if you want to get into any of the good roles. There has been an average package of around 8-10 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Great and vibrant infrastructure with lots of amenities and activities. You have different messes with food that are better compared to other universities that I have known and heard of, and many facilities like a gym, sports like TT, billiards, basketball, football, and many more.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Economics - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Very good infrastructure and very good amenities.

content.Placements: 50 percent of students were placed last year in my course. The lowest package is 2.5 LPA, and the highest package is nearly 5 LPA. Top recruiter companies are AU Bank, SBI Bank and other finance-related companies. Almost 80 percent of students get internships. Roles are cashier, Managerial, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Every corner of our campus has Wi-Fi, and each course has its labs and a central library which has a seating capacity of nearly 500 students. The mess food is average, and the hostel amenities are good. The college has a small clinic for emergencies, and it has a ground for cricket, football, badminton, etc.

admission_overview.title: MUJ Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Manipal University Jaipur admission 2026 is both merit and entrance-based. The college offers various courses at the UG, PG, PhD, online and certificate levels. These include- BTech, BA, MA, MBA, etc. BTech and MBA are some of the most popular courses at Manipal University Jaipur.

eligibility_selection.title: MUJ Eligibility and Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Manipal University Jaipur offers UG, PG, PhD, and online courses in various Engineering, Design, Management, Commerce, Science, and Arts & Law specialisations. Admission to these courses depends on the academic merit of students and PI. For certain courses, admissions are students based on entrance exam scores. Below are some popular MUJ courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:- Course

faqs.answer: Students can apply for Manipal University Jaipur course admissions through the official website. The admission mode is online. faqs.answer: Manipal University, Jaipur admissions are closed for the academic year 2025, except for the BArch and MArch courses. Candidates willing to take admission in any of these courses, can apply for admission online on the official website of the college.
faqs.question: Are Manipal University, Jaipur admissions open?

faqs.answer: Manipal University offers BTech course via Manipal Institute of Technology. In order to get admission to a four-year BTech course at Manipal Institute of Technology, the first step is to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria. Candidates who passed Class 12 in the Science stream are eligible to apply for this course. Manipal BTech admissions are completely entrance-based. The Manipal University conducts Manipal Entrance Test (MET) for the selection of eligible candidates for its UG & PG courses. It's mandatory for candidates to qualify for MET with a valid score. Further, the selected students are allocated seats through a counselling process.
faqs.question: Can I take direct admission in Manipal University for BTech?

paragraphs: Manipal University Jaipuroffers various courses to candidates. The admission process of these courses begin with registration of candidates online on the official website of the college. Below is a breakdown ofManipal University Jaipur admission process:-

Application can be made on the official website. Students can also choose to apply for multiple courses, with separate form and application fees. New applicants are to submit the relevant details and documents in the online application, and submit it through the Manipal Jaipur admission portal.

MUJ has a rigorous selection procedure and includes factors like academic performance and other relevant test scores and other criteria that are particular to that programme. The university can also carry out any further testing or interviews as part of the selection procedure, and this will allow the university to be holistic in its approach to student admissions.

On a successful selection process, notification will be done via the admission microsite, email, and SMS. Successful applicants will also be issued with an all-inclusive admission letter containing the important details, such as semester fees, the date of study commencement, course location and time, hostel accommodatios, scholarships, and the list of documents needed to be enrolled. Candidates must pay theManipal University Jaipur feesto confirm admission.

courses_data.description: Manipal University Jaipur offers the BTech course at the UG level for four years. Admissions to the course are entrance-based and scores of the MET/JEE Mains exams are accepted.

faqs.question: What are the essential qualifications for admission to BTech course at Manipal University Jaipur?
faqs.answer: To be eligble for the BTech programme at Manipal Jaipur the candidates need Class 12 pass with 60% aggregate or equivalent in Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects while Chemistry/Computers Science/ Biotechnology/Biology/Statistics/ Engineering Drawing as optional subjects. For the lateral entry BTech programme offered by Manipal University Jaipur the aspiring candidates need a pass in three-year Diploma programme with 50% aggregate in relevant field of Engineering/BSc (PCM).

faqs.question: Is there any management / reservation / donation quota available at Manipal University, Jaipur?
faqs.answer: There is no Management quota, or reserved / donation seats or payment seats of any kind. Students' admission is purely given basis the merit.

faqs.question: Does Manipal consider Class 12th scores?
faqs.answer: Yes, Manipal consider the Class 12th scores for admissions. The mode ofManipal University Jaipur course admissionsdepends on both merit & entrance examinations. The Manipal University entrance tests accepted for diff. programmes includeSAT India, MET, JEE Main, & others.

courses_data.description: Manipal University Jaipur offers the MBA course at the PG level for two years. Admissions to the course are entrance-based and scores of the CAT/MAT/XAT/ GMAT/ CMAT exams are accepted. The college also conducts a PI round for admission.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to MBA course at Manipal University, Jaipur?
faqs.answer: To get admission for MBA at Manipal University, students need to appear and pass in any one of the entrance exams accepted by the university, like CAT, MAT, XAT, GMAT,etc.  Students are required to fill out an application form directly from the official website to get a chance at admission.

The CAT cutoff for 2023 was also the same. So, going by the previous years' cutoff trends, the CAT Cutoff 2025 would fall around this level.Please note that this is just an estimation and the actual cutoff may vary.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by Manipal University Jaipur?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Manipal University Jaipur has an entrance test on courses like the BTech.The first exam is referred to as MET (Manipal Entrance Test).Applicants to the BTech programme are required to have a Class 12 pass of 60 percent aggregate or equivalent with Physics and Mathematics as core subjects and Chemistry/Computers Science/ Biotechnology/Biology/ Statistics/ Engineering Drawing as optional subjects.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Manipal Jaipur?
faqs.answer: Manipal University Jaipur does not provide direct admission to all the courses. However it does provide direct admission to some of the courses such as BCA, BBA, BA, BCom. Admission to these courses takes place on the basis of class 12 exam and personal interview. For some of the courses candidates might have to take English Compregension tests. Primarily BTech and M.Tech admision takes place on the basis of JEE and GATE scores.

paragraphs: Manipal University Jaipur continues to placed its students in reputed companies. The details for the batch 2025 are yet to be released. However, the University has achived 94% placements in the academic year 2023-24. The highest package offered to Engineering students of the batch 2024 stood at INR 88 LPA , whereas the average salary was INR 8.5 LPA . The participating recruiters presented 1664 job offers to the students. Some of the top recruiters of Manipal University Jaipur include Amazon, Accenture, KPMG, Bosch, Microsoft, Deloitte, etc.

As per the NIRF 2025, the institute ranked #98 under Overall category, #58 under University, #58 under Engineering, #81 under Management, and #32 under Law. Manipal University Jaipur excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. nirf.description:
As per the overall score, Manipal University Jaipur has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is observable that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown an increasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. In 2025, Manipal University Jaipur climbed 3 ranks to #98 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Manipal University Jaipur climbed 6 ranks to #58 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The institute has displayed an increasing trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Manipal University Jaipur climbed 6 ranks to #58 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The institute's ranks in the 'Management' category; have shown a fluctuation when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Manipal University Jaipur fell 8 ranks to #81 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.

reviews.review_heading: My experience and review at Manipal University Jaipur as a fresher of 2025.
reviews.review_text: It is the best college according to facilities and infrastructure in all of Rajasthan. Hostels feel like a 5-star residence colony. Everything is available in hostels, hospitals, cafes, shops, parks, gym, sports facilities, and indoor games, almost everything. No need to go out of the hostels for any legal matter. They have professional cooks for the mess, and every day is something different and tasty in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, self-study is important.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are above average, with decent rooms, food, and basic amenities, better than those at other colleges I have seen. However, the hostel fees are also on the higher side compared to many other colleges, so it is expensive for some students. You can also apply for a student loan. College is friendly with loan documentation.

reviews.review_heading: It offers supportive faculty members and a good learning environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Manipal University, Jaipur, is top-notch and rewarded with many awards as well. The campus is Griha-rated, which is also a great achievement. Facilities at the hostel are also very good. They take care of students. Their priority is students' safety and health.

reviews.review_heading: Quite a good university giving average placements, great infrastructure, and vibrant culture.
reviews.review_text: Great and vibrant infrastructure with lots of amenities and activities. You have different messes with food that are better compared to other universities that I have known and heard of, and many facilities like a gym, sports like TT, billiards, basketball, football, and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Very good infrastructure and very good amenities.
reviews.review_text: Every corner of our campus has Wi-Fi, and each course has its labs and a central library which has a seating capacity of nearly 500 students. The mess food is average, and the hostel amenities are good. The college has a small clinic for emergencies, and it has a ground for cricket, football, badminton, etc.

reviews.review_heading: If you have money then only come to this college, else no need.
reviews.review_text: MUJ has a modern and well-planned campus. Classrooms are smart and spacious, labs are well-equipped, and the library is excellent. The hostels are clean with good facilities, and the campus has great sports grounds and a vibrant environment. Opt for hostels if you want access to more sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The facilities of our college are top-notch and have a beautiful infrastructure. They provide Wi-Fi hotspots, AC classrooms, a central library, 4-5 auditoriums, a cricket ground, a football ground, a running track, a badminton court, a basketball court, and many other sports facilities. We have a very good food court.

reviews.review_heading: This is a decent tier-2 college with average placements and great campus life.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is too good but expensive compared to other colleges, and it has various food outlets in the college and hostel too. The sports facilities are really good, and there is also a great campus life in this college, as well as a hostel. I am really loving the campus life over here.

reviews.review_heading: The college makes us industry-ready.
reviews.review_text: The course covers all the topics related to being industry-ready. The university organizes many seminars to provide knowledge, there are many competitions organized for students, and many industry experts come for the lectures. The attendance policy is strict (75%), and the university provides good placement opportunities. The only con that the university has is its location.

reviews.review_heading: Manipal University Jaipur is the upcoming premier Institution of India.
reviews.review_text: Excellent library and classrooms. Well equipped library with rare titles. There is a central library where you can get early sprint versions of very old books, which are practically extinct in the market. Well furnished athletic centers as well as well equipped gymnasium, football, basketball court, tennis court, swimming pool, table tennis, cricket ground, etc.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with some flaws.
reviews.review_text: College has excellent infrastructure especially if you are going to live in the hostel facility of college GHS. The college is not that big. It has a main building called as dome building with library in it for B.Tech and other branches. We have 4 other blocks and 2 messes in total with many cafeterias around the college university. We also have a cricket ground with basketball court, badminton, and tennis court along with a football area. The infrastructure is excellent, to be precise.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and good faculty!
reviews.review_text: The college has air-conditioned classrooms. The college has Wi-Fi, good and big libraries, good faculty, really high-tech computers in labs, and a lot of food canteens available. The rooms are really good and feel very high-end. The food is good. There are two types of meals, and medical service is provided.

reviews.review_heading: Welcome to Manipal University.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are top-notch, you never feel missing your home, you get more than a vip college. It has a perfect campus, good Wi-Fi, clean and air-conditioned classrooms, more than 3 libraries, and well connectivity between hostel and college. Hostels are also pretty decent. We get Wi-Fi, decent mess food sometimes, due to excess crowd we have to wait last long to an hour. Medical facilities are also good. There is always an ambulance available 24X7 for the Manipal Hospital, Jaipur, for any...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Manipal University, Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: The campus infrastructure is excellent. It is very large, and many facilities are available. The hostel is also good, with two messes. The food is very good, and there are some outlets. There is a recreational room where we can play table tennis and pool. There is a cricket turf and a football turf.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college for students who are eager to find their career.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at MUJ (Manipal University Jaipur) is magnificent. The buildings give royal Rajasthan Mahal's look. Wi-Fi network is all around the campus. Labs are equipped with high-end equipments. The classrooms are air-conditioned with a projector. Library is open for 12 hours a day. You can get a variety of books out there. For sports like volleyball, basketball, tennis, a number of courts are built. A cricket ground is also being built now. So that's pretty great.

There is a range in the fee because the MBA programme is also offered as a five-year integrated programme and as this programme involves five-year of tuition fee( different fees for first three years and then last two-years) the range has gone up. Admission to these programmes is done on the basis of entrace tests like CAT, MAT, CMAT, XAT or GMAT. To be eligible for this programme the candidates need a minimum of 50% in thier graduation. college_info.intro:
BTech in Applied Petroleum Engineering with specialisations in Energy Systems and Storage, Intelligent Petroleum Systems & Gas Engineering Informatics is a flagship course offered at UPES Kandoli campus. It is a comprehensive four-year course that equips students with a solid understanding of the oil and gas industry.
For this programme, UPES University Dehradun has international academic collaborations with prestigious universities such as the University of New South Wales and University of Aberdeen.
Did you know? UPES Dehradun claims to have a 100% placement record with top employers such as Schlumberger, Exxon Mobil, Shell, Haliburton, Cairn Energy and Reliance Industries Limited.
Check out the video below to know more about UPES programmes:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: In addition to its flagship BTech programme, UPES Dehradun also offers BSc, BBA, BPharm, BDes and BCom, and more at the undergraduate level. At the Postgraduate level, MBA, MCA, MSc, MTech, MA, and MDes programmes are offered. UPES University Dehradun courses are offered in full-time and online mode under streams such as Engineering, Management, Science, Business, and more. Below are some of the courses offered by UPES Kandoli and their respective eligibility and fees:

faqs.answer: A:    UPES offers an MBA programme at the PG level. It is offered in full-time mode for 2 years. The total tuition fee of MBA at University of Petroleum in Dehradun ranges between INR 16.7 Lacs and INR 19.5 lakh.
faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee of MBA at UPES?

faqs.answer: A:    UPES MBA fee is between INR 1.5 lakh and INR 15.7 lakh as per an unofficial source. The fee is calculated based on tuition fee and does not includes other components. Students are required to pay course fee after completion of all selection rounds to confirm their seats. The selection to MBA course will be based on national and university level entrance exams like CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, UPESMET, etc., followed by group discussion and personal interview round. In case a candidate is unable to pay fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. The application fee for MBA course is INR 1,350. They can pay the registration fee via any of online payment mode.
faqs.question: What is the fees of UPES MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    To get into the UPES School of Computer Science M.Tech program, you must have at least 60% marks in both your 10th and 12th grade. You must also have a minimum of 60% in your graduation. You can apply to UPES College based on your board merit. You must also take the annual UPSEAT exam to get admission.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security and Digital Forensics) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The college can improve on the placement records.

review_content.Placements: A smaller number of student placement records have been shown this year, and I heard about the fact that Microsoft banned this college from entering for placements due to an internal issue. The placements average at 7 to 10LPA, that too if you are qualified with a good amount of knowledge in the field.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are fair, sports facilities can be improved, and there are frequent Wi-Fi problems. I went inside the on campus hostel and noticed the rooms are smaller but ventilated well with a good mess. There needs to be more events based on communities outside the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Cloud Computing and Virtualization Technology) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Career prospects are strong, though classrooms can feel average.

review_content.Placements: UPES has excellent placement opportunities, especially in CSE. Around 90-95% students are placed with the highest package going above 50 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA. Opportunities are there, but for top performers. Core roles are limited, and many companies offer mass recruitment profiles.
review_content.Infrastructure: UPES has one of the best infrastructures among private universities in India, but classrooms should have AC. Hostel and cafeteria are decent, the view from hostel is epic. Wi-Fi-enabled labs are advanced, well-stocked libraries. Sometimes you feel crowded in hostel.

course_faqs.question: What is the fees for M.Tech at UPES School of Advanced Engineering?
course_faqs.answer: Students must pay the fees within the stipulated time frame to secure their admission into the course. The fee can be paid online or offline through various modes of payment such as credit/debit card, net banking, or demand draft. The fees can cost about three to 6 lakhs. It also depends on the stream of majors chosen by the candidate. There are also additional fees. On the other hand, the college also provides various scholarships for the students.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for BBA in UPES University Dehradun?
overview_faqs.answer: Total tuition fee for BBA ranges between INR 1.5 Lacs and INR 14 Lacs as per unofficial source. The fee excludes other fee components like caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Aspirants are required to pay course fee after completion of all selection rounds to confirm their seats. Selection to BBA course will be based on national and university level entrance exams like UPESMET UG, UGAT or CUET UG followed by a personal interview round. For admission to Global BBA, candidates need to qualify PI round and submit Statement of Purpose. If a student is unable to pay fee within given time, his or her admission will be cancelled. Students also need to pay registration fee through online mode to apply for admission. The application fee for UPESMET UG is INR 1,350.

overview_faqs.question: How do I check the refund policy of UPES Dehradun?
overview_faqs.answer: UPES Dehradun offers has a fee refund policy. Students can go to its portal to check the same. To access the portal, candidates are required to visit the official website of university and click on fee refund policy. Here, candidates are required to enter the application number to get refund policy.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fee refund rules at UPES Dehradun?
overview_faqs.answer: In UPES Dehradun, fees once paid will be fully refunded, with a deduction of INR 1,000 for processing charges if a withdrawal request is made before the session starts. In case a withdrawal application is made after the commencement of classes, fees will be refunded after a deduction along with a deduction of INR 1000 towards processing charges. The fee shall be refunded within 90 days of the start of the academic session if the refund application is submitted before the start of the session.

overview_faqs.question: Why choose UPES Dehradun?
overview_faqs.answer: Some of top USPs of University of Petroleum and Energy Dehradun are as follows:Diverse Scholarship Opportunities: UPES Dehradun offers multiple scholarships, namely Domicile Scholarships, Alumni Scholarship, Jyoti Scholarship, International Student Scholarships and more.Global Partnerships: UPES University offers students global exposure through international academic partnerships with universities like University of New South Wales and the University of Aberdeen.Top-Tier Talent Partners: University of Dehradun Petroleum and Energy has a distinguished list of recruiters such as Cairn Oil & Gas-Vedanta Ltd., Reliance Industries Limited, and Shell India, along with consulting firms like McKinsey & Company and Bain & Company.

review_summary.college_name: UPES Dehradun Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Applied Petroleum Engineering (Intelligent Petroleum Systems) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely I am satisfied because of good culture, faculty, and good placement in 2025.

content.Placements: About 95 percent of students are placed in the year 2025, the highest package is about 35 LPA, the average is about 11 LPA, and the top recruiters for our branch are Cairn Oil & Gas, Vedanta Ltd, ONGC, Adani Gas, HP, Oil India Limited, GAIL, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good, we have a common library, the campus is divided into blocks in which classes are conducted, sports facilities are also good, the college hostel has a limited number of seats so I would prefer an off-campus hostel, but the food in the campus is good.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Finance Management - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Knowledgeable faculty and support.

content.Placements: 99% are placed. 6 LPA is the lowest package, and 33 LPA is the highest, but placement records are good, and everyone is getting placements somewhere else, and students are also supportive. Zepto, blinkit, EY, KPMG ITC, Indigo, Aadani Airpot, ONGC and all are recruiting. 100% got internships. Manager and Consulting roles are offered. placements are also good.
content.Infrastructure: Everything has Wi-Fi, a good connection, good college life and a view. Hostel life is amazing and has to be seen, and the night view and jamming sessions are the point of attraction.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security and Digital Forensics) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college can improve on the placement records.

content.Placements: A smaller number of student placement records have been shown this year, and I heard about the fact that Microsoft banned this college from entering for placements due to an internal issue. The placements average at 7 to 10LPA, that too if you are qualified with a good amount of knowledge in the field.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are fair, sports facilities can be improved, and there are frequent Wi-Fi problems. I went inside the on campus hostel and noticed the rooms are smaller but ventilated well with a good mess. There needs to be more events based on communities outside the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Cloud Computing and Virtualization Technology) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Career prospects are strong, though classrooms can feel average.

content.Placements: UPES has excellent placement opportunities, especially in CSE. Around 90-95% students are placed with the highest package going above 50 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA. Opportunities are there, but for top performers. Core roles are limited, and many companies offer mass recruitment profiles.
content.Infrastructure: UPES has one of the best infrastructures among private universities in India, but classrooms should have AC. Hostel and cafeteria are decent, the view from hostel is epic. Wi-Fi-enabled labs are advanced, well-stocked libraries. Sometimes you feel crowded in hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Graphics and Gaming) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, overcrowded for B.Tech students, and placement is average.

content.Placements: I am in second year so no one is placed in my batch. But the senior gets package which is well and good. The highest package is around 60 LPA in my course, and average is 12 LPA. Some top recruiting companies are TCS, Microsoft, Amazon, and others. Internship is mandatory in our course so everyone gets an internship.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has all the facilities like Wi-Fi, computers, and labs. I live off campus so I don't have an idea of the hostel on campus. In sports, we have basketball, football, volleyball, badminton, cricket, and many others. We also have tournaments and all to encourage students.

admission_overview.title: UPES Dehradun Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: UPES Dehradun admission 2026 is both merit and entrance-based. The university provides more than twenty programmes at the UG, PG, and PhD levels. These are offered in fields, such as Engineering, Management, Science, Business, Design, Law, Computer Applications, Commerce, and Arts. The modes of study can be full-time or online, depending on the course. UPES Dehradun conducts its entrance exams, such as UPESMET UG, UPESEAT, etc., for admission to some specific courses including BTech, MBA, BBA, etc. The university also accepts JEE Main, CAT, CUET UG & PG, etc as an alternative. The admission mode differs by course with details in the eligibility table given below. Interested students can read this article to get all the details on UPES admissions.

paragraphs: UPES Dehradunadmission processincludes from application process, selection rounds and final admission confirmation. Students should go through all these steps to get seat at university. Admission is done online.UPES admission processis mentioned below:
UPES Dehradun Application Process 2026
Students can register and apply at the university's website. To complete the process, students need to submit the form, pay an application fees of INR 1750 and uplaod the necessary documents.
Application Screening & Shortlisting 2026
Admission Confirmation 2026

After the interview rounds, the institution will notify the selected candidates of their admission status, typically through email or other appropriate means. To secure their admission, selected candidates must complete the required admission formalities and submit the necessary documents within the specified time, confirming their seat in the programme and pay for a certain amount of UPES Dehradun fees for the respective courses.
For details about UPES Admission Process check the below video:
lists: Following the submission of applications, candidates undergo a screening process. The screening involves assessing eligibility and selection criteria. Applicants are shortlisted based on their academic performance and other relevant qualifications, as specified in the eligibility.

UPES Dehradun conducts its entrance exams likeUPESPAT, UPESMET UG, UPESEAT,UPESMETfor BPharma, BBA, BTech, and MBA respectively. The university also acceptsJEE Main, CAT, NEET, SAT India, CUET, etc.as per the course requirements.
The final stage of selection involves a personal interview to assess the candidate's suitability, aspirations, and alignment with the desired course.

faqs.question: How to get seat in UPES Dehradun?
faqs.answer: Students can check below the steps to get a seat at UPES Dehradun:Log on to the official website.Complete your application form online.The selection criteria is entrance/merit-based.Upon selected, pay the specified fee to confirm and secure your seat.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is conducted by UPES?
faqs.answer: UPES Dehradun conducts its own entrance exams, such as UPESMET, UPESMET UG, UPESPAT, etc. for providing admission to specific courses. See the table below to know more about the university-level exams conducted for popular UPES courses:Course NameIn-house ExamsMBAUPESMETBTech/ BTech (Hons)UPESEATBBAUPESMET UGBPharmaUPESPAT

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in School of Health Sciences and Technology, UPES?
faqs.answer: To get admission in School of Health Sciences and Technology, UPES candidates might have to complete multi-step process. Check below the admission steps for UPES:Application:The mode of application is online. The application fee for BTech, BPharma, MSc, and BSc is  INR 1,350 each.Selection rounds:The university conducts its own entrance exams for providing admission to specific courses. Apart from these, UPES Dehradun also accepts national-level entrance exams like CUET UG, NEET, JEE Main, etc.Admission confirmation:After completion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. Aspirants need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Can I get into UPES School of Computer Science M.Tech with 70% in class 12th?
faqs.answer: To get into the UPES School of Computer Science M.Tech program, you must have at least 60% marks in both your 10th and 12th grade. You must also have a minimum of 60% in your graduation.You can apply to UPES College based on your board merit. You must also take the annual UPSEAT exam to get admission.

placement_data.title: UPES Dehradun Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: UPES Dehradun placement 2025 are ongoing. The UPES placement rate recorded in 2025 so far is 92%. The overall highest package offered in 2025 till date was INR 52 LPA . It was offered to BTech students from the School of Computer Science . The highest salary recorded in School of Advance Engineering and School of Business was 27.6 LPA and 29 LPA. Highest package of 11.7 LPA and 22.5 LPA was offered to students of School of Design and School of Law . Highest salary in the School of Health Sciences & Technology and School of Liberal Studies and Media was 6 LPA and 5 LPA.

faqs.question: How are the placement statistics of UPES Dehradun and what are its best fields?
faqs.answer: 2444 students were placed and 800 companies visited during UPES placement 2025. The highest package recorded was 52 LPA. Earlier in 2024, the highest package was 49 LPA. The placement rate in 2025 was above 90%.

faqs.question: How many students were placed during UPES Dehradun placements in the past few years?
faqs.answer: A total of 2444 students were placed in 2025. Earlier, 2482 students were placed durin the placement drive 2024. The placement rate recorded in 2025 and 2024 was 92% and 92.41%.

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered during the recent UPES Dehradun placements?
faqs.answer: The highest package during UPES Dehradun placement 2025 was INR 52 LPA. In 2024, the highest salary was 49 LPA. Growth of over 6% was witnessed as compared with previous year.

faqs.question: How good is UPES Dehradun for MBA placements?
faqs.answer: MBA is one of the popular courses of UPES Dehradun. When it comes to placements, the University offers decent placements annually. The highest package offered during UPES MBA placements 2025 stood at INR 29 LPA. The top 10% UPES MBA average package offered during UPES placements 2025 stood was 15.8 LPA.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters for MBA at UPES Dehradun?

faqs.question: What is the fees of UPES MBA?
faqs.answer: UPES MBA fee is between INR 1.5 lakh and INR 15.7 lakh as per an unofficial source. The fee is calculated based on tuition fee and does not includes other components. Students are required to pay course fee after completion of all selection rounds to confirm their seats. The selection to MBA course will be based on national and university level entrance exams like CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, UPESMET, etc., followed by group discussion and personal interview round. In case a candidate is unable to pay fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. The application fee for MBA course is INR 1,350. They can pay the registration fee via any of online payment mode.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for UPES Dehradun?
faqs.answer: Students seeking for UPES Dehradun engineering admissions have to register for UPESEAT. The application fee for the same is INR 1750. Students can pay the fee online through net banking/ UPI/ Credit Card/ Debit Card. Note: The fee is taken from offiical sources and can change.

pgp_placements.intro_text: UPES Dehradun School of Business placement data 2025 is released.MBA highest packagerecorded in2025wasINR 29 LPA.Top 10%MBA students receivedaverage packageof INR 15.8 LPA.

faqs.question: How good is UPES Dehradun for MBA placements?
faqs.answer: MBA is one of the popular courses of UPES Dehradun. When it comes to placements, the University offers decent placements annually. The highest package offered during UPES MBA placements 2025 stood at INR 29 LPA. The top 10% UPES MBA average package offered during UPES placements 2025 stood was 15.8 LPA.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters for MBA at UPES Dehradun?
faqs.answer: Some of the eminent companies that were part of the recent UPES Dehradun placements are mentioned in the table below: UPES Dehradun Top Recruiters Schlumberger Amazon Adobe Microsoft ONGC Deloitte KPMG EY PwC

faqs.question: What is the fees of UPES MBA?
faqs.answer: UPES MBA fee is between INR 1.5 lakh and INR 15.7 lakh as per an unofficial source. The fee is calculated based on tuition fee and does not includes other components. Students are required to pay course fee after completion of all selection rounds to confirm their seats. The selection to MBA course will be based on national and university level entrance exams like CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, UPESMET, etc., followed by group discussion and personal interview round. In case a candidate is unable to pay fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. The application fee for MBA course is INR 1,350. They can pay the registration fee via any of online payment mode.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for UPES Dehradun?
faqs.answer: Students seeking for UPES Dehradun engineering admissions have to register for UPESEAT. The application fee for the same is INR 1750. Students can pay the fee online through net banking/ UPI/ Credit Card/ Debit Card. Note: The fee is taken from offiical sources and can change.

description: UPES Dehradun cutoff 2025 for admission to the MBA programme is determined by candidates' performance in the national-level management entrance exams such as CAT, XAT, MAT, CMAT, and GMAT. In the meantime, students can refer to the sections below to view the UPES Dehradun cutoff 2024 for different exams, courses, and categories.

Students can refer to the table below to know the UPES Dehradun MBA cutoff based on the NMAT score and MAT percentile. Students can refer to the tables below for the cutoff date for the year 2024, and previous two years, i.e., 2023 and 2022 for various MBA specialisations.

As per UPES Dehradun cut off 2024 for MBA, the minimum NMAT cutoff score is 140. Also, taking into consideration XAT cutoff for MBA in Operations Management, candidates must have an overall percentile of 50 for General All India category students. In 2024, the cutoff for all MBA specialisations for the MAT exam is 70 for the General AI quota. On analysing the two years, we can say that there has been no change in the cutoff trends.

Students who want admission to UPES, Dehradun for its MBA course, should keep track of the important dates related to national-level entrance exams, like NMAT, XAT, etc. To help with the same, the table below contains the important dates for admission at UPES, Dehradun.

highlights.description:
UPES is one of India’s top institutes. Eminent national & international ranking bodies have acknowledged it as a leading institute. As per NIRF 2025, the ranking of the institute is #64 in the Overall category, #45 under University, #43 under Engineering, #36 under Management, and #18 under Law. Talking about the international rankings, the QS World Rankings 2025 has awarded rank #801-850 to UPES. The institute is ranked as one of the best institutes for its top class faculty. The article mentioned in this space covers all the details you need if you are interested in UPES rankings.

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, UPES has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend. In 2025, UPES fell 5 ranks to #64 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, UPES climbed 1 rank to #45 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, UPES fell 1 rank to #43 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute's ranks in the 'Management' category; have shown a fluctuation when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, UPES climbed 5 ranks to #36 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.

hostel_campus.college_name: UPES Dehradun Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: University of Petroleum and Energy Studies has separate hostel for boys and girls with a capacity of more than 2000 students at Bidholi and Kandoli campuses. All the hostels have wi fi facility for learning.Common room has been provided in each hostel for relaxation and 24*7 power back up and solar power water heaters facility is available.The hostels have mess facility.Air conditioned hostels are also available. UPES has also tied up with private hostels for girls students in the city to offer appropriate accommodation outside the campus. All accommodation is on a triple sharing basis.
facilities: Library: UPES library has a seating capacity of more than 400 students and contains over 73,327 volumes of publications including books, standards, reports, proceedings, and more than 150 national and international journals. It also has a rich collection of online resources in terms of CDs, access to specialised portals on oil and gas and power-related information

Hotels: UPES has a separate hostel for boys and girls with a capacity of more than 2000 students at the Bidholi and Kandoli campuses. All the hostels have a Wi-Fi facility for learning. A common room has been provided in each hostel for relaxation and a 24*7 power backup and solar power water heaters facility is available

Cafeteria: The university has a multi-storied food court within the campus, has a number of food courts and cafeterias with a modern ambiance to provide nutritious and balanced meals, snacks, and beverages to students of both campuses
Sports Complex: UPES has a multipurpose playground for playing hockey, cricket, football, and other sports with world-class sports facilities and equipment

library.description: UPES’s library has a seating capacity of more than 400 students and contains over 73,327 volumes of publications including books, standards, reports, proceedings and more than 150 National and International journals in the fields of petroleum exploration, power, infrastructure, chemical, computer, electrical, electronic and mechanical engineering, information technology and management, etc. It also has a rich collection of online resources in terms of CDs, access to specialized portals on oil and gas and power related information. UPES has also acquired institutional memberships of the British Council Library, the American Centre Library, the AIMA Library, the Central Secretariat library and DELNET, IIP, WIHG Dehradun. As a part of collaboration IFP,France has gifted a large no. of books and Shell, a global oil major has also gifted a large number of technical books to the library.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Volleyball court

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by School of Engineering, UPESReviewed on 31 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely I am satisfied because of good culture, faculty, and good placement in 2025.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good, we have a common library, the campus is divided into blocks in which classes are conducted, sports facilities are also good, the college hostel has a limited number of seats so I would prefer an off-campus hostel, but the food in the campus is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by School of Business, UPESReviewed on 5 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Knowledgeable faculty and support.
reviews.review_text: Everything has Wi-Fi, a good connection, good college life and a view. Hostel life is amazing and has to be seen, and the night view and jamming sessions are the point of attraction.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by School of Computer Science, UPESReviewed on 18 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college can improve on the placement records.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are fair, sports facilities can be improved, and there are frequent Wi-Fi problems. I went inside the on campus hostel and noticed the rooms are smaller but ventilated well with a good mess. There needs to be more events based on communities outside the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by School of Computer Science, UPESReviewed on 18 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Career prospects are strong, though classrooms can feel average.
reviews.review_text: UPES has one of the best infrastructures among private universities in India, but classrooms should have AC. Hostel and cafeteria are decent, the view from hostel is epic. Wi-Fi-enabled labs are advanced, well-stocked libraries. Sometimes you feel crowded in hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by School of Computer Science, UPESReviewed on 10 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, overcrowded for B.Tech students, and placement is average.
reviews.review_text: Our college has all the facilities like Wi-Fi, computers, and labs. I live off campus so I don't have an idea of the hostel on campus. In sports, we have basketball, football, volleyball, badminton, cricket, and many others. We also have tournaments and all to encourage students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by School of Engineering, UPESReviewed on 8 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: So basically, if you are willing to have good placements and be successful.
reviews.review_text: So TBH, I am not living in the campus hostel as the campus hostel serves non-veg food, and I have been a vegan from birth. So I avoid living inside the college campus. But I have seen some facilities and also heard more from my friends, like good infrastructure with good-speed Wi-Fi, properly furnished rooms with no smelly gallery, separate balconies, and many more. Medical facilities and other curricular activities are also available on campus in different places with different rules.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by School of Computer Science, UPESReviewed on 28 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Industry-focused curriculum with great campus life.
reviews.review_text: College offers modern infrastructure with Wi-Fi, labs, smart classrooms, and a rich library. Hostels are safe with decent food, medical care is available 24/7, and the campus has strong sports and fitness facilities for an overall balanced student life.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by School of Computer Science, UPESReviewed on 9 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: UPES 2025 updated information, all about infrastructure, placements, facilities, hostel, etc.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is pretty good, and UPES has its own Wi-Fi named UPESNET. It has a good high internet speed, and also the labs and classrooms are not the same as those at CU, GUE, and other private universities. It has far better infrastructure with a good environment, but when it comes to campus hostel, you are charged a lot higher fees, i.e., Rs. 1,94,000 for a triple sharing room, and the food in the mess is not of that good level. As a student who lived on campus for a year, it was very tough...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by School of Design, UPESReviewed on 16 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Great campus, creative vibe.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities, classrooms with projectors, design labs, a library, a sports ground, a hostel, a gym, WiFi, an infirmary, a multipurpose hall, cafeterias, and a lot of scenic and creative spaces. I haven't lived in the in-campus hostels, but I've heard they're okay, just overpriced.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by School of Design, UPESReviewed on 16 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Well-built campus providing you the best experience of what college life means.
reviews.review_text: Our hostels are provided with good spacious rooms, electricity, water supply, and water geysers. Food and canteen services are also neat and provided promptly. Medical services are also available when needed. UPES also provides Wi-Fi, has good labs, and tidy classrooms.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by School of Design, UPESReviewed on 16 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Creative campus with supportive faculty and growing opportunities in animation.
reviews.review_text: Our Animation and VFX course has good labs with drawing tables, powerful PCs, Wi-Fi, and projectors. The library has useful books and is peaceful. Classrooms are clean and have AC. The hostel rooms are decent, Wi-Fi is pretty bad, not going to lie, and the washrooms are clean if maintained. Food in the mess is average, but the canteen has better options. Medical help is available 24/7 on campus. There is a sports ground, a basketball court, and indoor games too. Overall, if you stay involved and...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by School of Computer Science, UPESReviewed on 12 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A good college for a person seeking a nice social life with good studies.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure here at UPES is very nice, all blocks are well furnished with peaceful white theme classes. In campus hostels are good. Since I live outside the campus hostel, I heard that the mess food there is not that good. Hostel has a lot of indoor games. There are many grounds dedicated to every sport. Regular contests and competitions occur for sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by School of Business, UPESReviewed on 20 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Everything is good about this college; what life teaches you.
reviews.review_text: 1Absolutely, the facilities and infrastructure we are getting are very good. I believe there is nothing left that our college does not cover. There are various types of hostels, such as 3 sharing common washrooms, and non- AC which costs - 83, 1,83,000. Sharing common washrooms with AC which costs Rs. 1,93,000. Sharing attached bathrooms with AC which costs Rs. 2,45,000. The hostels are quite expensive; normal-class people can't afford them. Everything else is good. Also, the mess food is good; ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by School of Business, UPESReviewed on 8 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college was overall very good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are fully furnished and the seating arrangement is good in the classrooms. We had full access to the smart boards and everything in the ventilation system was good. The library was fully furnished, and quiet and comfortable seats were there for 9 hr access every day. The library was centralized. Facilities were good in the hostel. Rooms were fully furnished and connected washrooms were available. Some rooms had air conditioning. The food in the mess was good. There was a convenience s...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by School of Computer Science, UPESReviewed on 2 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best B.Teach college in Uttarakhand.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities here are great. Course facilities are very good, and the department is well-equipped with available Wi-Fi. Labs and classrooms are well-equipped, and the library is excellent. Medical facilities are available at any time, and sports activities happen daily.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Medical Lab Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good college welcomes all new students.

review_content.Placements: In our college there are B.Sc. courses in MLT, RIT, OT&AT, MBBS, and dental science. These courses are available. I am studying B.Sc. MLT in this course, which has a total of 20 students and is a 4-year course. There are 3 years with an exam and one year of internship. Also, in this course there is a good scope.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college there are different departments for each subject. Also, they provide Wi-Fi in each class and also include practical labs in MLT. There are microbiology, pathology, and biochemistry as the main subjects. In the hostel, the food is not proper, and the toilets are not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good for studies but no events for 1st years .

review_content.Placements: KIMS college provides 12 months of internships in various disciplines like ENT, ortho, general, etc. After the internship program, we can practice as professional doctor anywhere in India. Our college have MBBS and BDS nursing, allied health science in medicine and engineering and also school.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a central library and department-wise library; there is no Wi-Fi in the hostel; the food is average; there is no play ground or canteen for 1st year; the faculty are good and they are well trained and qualified; the laboratories are good. The hostel and class room are a little old but they are in good condition.

review_summary.college_name: Karpaga Vinayaga Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Center Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My College Diary Which Comprises My Personal Experience.

content.Placements: There were a total of 150 students in my batch. My course doesn’t usually offer placements as it requires further studies or opening a separate clinic. There aren’t companies, but hospitals offering jobs. There are various special courses available for Master’s degrees.
content.Infrastructure: The rooms available here are pretty good. There are both three-sharing and two-sharing rooms. However, there is no air conditioning facility. The hostel has separate bathrooms and restrooms for each room. There is no Wi-Fi connection available. There is a library, but it has mostly old-edition books. The labs are well-equipped. There is also a gym facility for the students.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My college diary Summary: having good job offers.

content.Placements: I'm studying in the second year right now. In my classes, 150 students are there. There are 150 medical seats every year. 100% of students join my class. So, talking about the highest package, after completing this course, one can get up to 9 LPA and it can be increased further according to our skills. And the minimum one can get is up to 3-4 LPA package. The average package can be 7.2 LPA. After completion of the course, we can work in any hospital and even open our own clinics. In medicine, every student has to do an internship, so it is 100%. And the minimum too.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Lab Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good college welcomes all new students.

content.Placements: In our college there are B.Sc. courses in MLT, RIT, OT&AT, MBBS, and dental science. These courses are available. I am studying B.Sc. MLT in this course, which has a total of 20 students and is a 4-year course. There are 3 years with an exam and one year of internship. Also, in this course there is a good scope.
content.Infrastructure: In our college there are different departments for each subject. Also, they provide Wi-Fi in each class and also include practical labs in MLT. There are microbiology, pathology, and biochemistry as the main subjects. In the hostel, the food is not proper, and the toilets are not good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good for studies but no events for 1st years .

content.Placements: KIMS college provides 12 months of internships in various disciplines like ENT, ortho, general, etc. After the internship program, we can practice as professional doctor anywhere in India. Our college have MBBS and BDS nursing, allied health science in medicine and engineering and also school.
content.Infrastructure: There is a central library and department-wise library; there is no Wi-Fi in the hostel; the food is average; there is no play ground or canteen for 1st year; the faculty are good and they are well trained and qualified; the laboratories are good. The hostel and class room are a little old but they are in good condition.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It's a very good campus.

content.Placements: 98% of our college students get placed, with many highly placed at Apollo. Most of us are sent abroad for higher education. The highest package of doctors is here, and this is very natural.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are very nice, and all the equipment is there in our labs. They are well and good. The campus has a clean and neat atmosphere. Medical facilities are provided, and the food is good and healthy.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are friendly and teach well. They are highly qualified. The college provides very experienced staff who cover the courses in-depth. They teach us well and properly in the subject.

hostel_campus.college_name: Karpaga Vinayaga Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Center Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: My College Diary Which Comprises My Personal Experience.
reviews.review_text: The rooms available here are pretty good. There are both three-sharing and two-sharing rooms. However, there is no air conditioning facility. The hostel has separate bathrooms and restrooms for each room. There is no Wi-Fi connection available. There is a library, but it has mostly old-edition books. The labs are well-equipped. There is also a gym facility for the students.

reviews.review_heading: My college diary Summary: having good job offers.
reviews.review_text: The facilities here are good enough to learn the subjects and to gain knowledge. Classes here are taken in digital classrooms and chalkboard classrooms also. There is a projector, computer, audio system, board, and everything is here in the lecture hall. There is free Wi-Fi in college for every department. The classroom can stretch around 150 students, and there is enough ventilation for all. So, coming to the hostel, there are two-sharing rooms and three-sharing rooms available. Enough ventilat...

reviews.review_heading: Good college welcomes all new students.
reviews.review_text: In our college there are different departments for each subject. Also, they provide Wi-Fi in each class and also include practical labs in MLT. There are microbiology, pathology, and biochemistry as the main subjects. In the hostel, the food is not proper, and the toilets are not good.

reviews.review_heading: Good for studies but no events for 1st years .
reviews.review_text: There is a central library and department-wise library; there is no Wi-Fi in the hostel; the food is average; there is no play ground or canteen for 1st year; the faculty are good and they are well trained and qualified; the laboratories are good. The hostel and class room are a little old but they are in good condition.

reviews.review_heading: It's a very good campus.
reviews.review_text: Labs are very nice, and all the equipment is there in our labs. They are well and good. The campus has a clean and neat atmosphere. Medical facilities are provided, and the food is good and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Beyond books studies college life fun faculty teaching could be improved .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available are good but it is very costly for the feels that we pay. Tge classrooms are AC and have fans also. There us biometry to check for attendance and also manual attendance. The quality of food available in hostel is not so good.

reviews.review_heading: A short note about Karpaga Vinayaga Institute of Medical Science and Research.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are air-conditioned, with a library and tablets designed for students, and all the books are available. Hostels are separate for freshers, with accommodations for three people per room, along with cool drinking water supply, hot water for bathing, and laundry service.

The entrance examinations accepted are MAT, CAT, Karnataka PGCET, KCET, etc. The university releases a merit list to announce the names of shortlisted aspirants.

Further, candidates are also selected for M.Tech course based on PGEE (Postgraduate Entrance Exam) score conducted by the university. content.Placements: Nitk mechanical is the best among all NITs in the QRF ranking. It has a placement rate of about 85 percent. Major core companies that came for placements this year were Apple for mechanical with a minor in ECE, L&T, Bajaj, Suzuki, ONGC, and HPCL. IN 2025 the average package for mechanical is 15 LPA. Internship opportunities are abundant across branches with a stipend of roughly 20k to 1 Lakh per month and many PPOs.
content.Infrastructure: Mechanical depth of Nitk has one of the best infrastructures among all departments. It has all the research related facilities, specialized labs like CAD/CAM, Internal combustion engines, and advanced research labs in areas such as strength of materials, robotics etc. Hostels have double and triple sharing rooms with 2 common washrooms on each floor. Ethernet facility for the internet.

admission_overview.college_name: University of Mysore India Course Admissions 2026: Fee, Eligibility & Selection, Application Form

admission_overview.title: Mysore University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Mysore University admission is both entrance or merit-based depending upon the applied course. The university conducts Postgraduate Entrance Exam (PGEE) for admission to PG courses. University of Mysore only offers PG courses on its campus. Additionally, all the UG programmes offered here are only provided via the constituent colleges under the university. The university has 235+ affiliated colleges and five constituent colleges incorporated under it. It is also accredited with ‘Grade A’ by NAAC and offers various UG, PG, MPhil and Doctorate programmes in multiple disciplines. Besides the regular courses, the university offers UG and PG courses in online mode through the Directorate of Online Programmes, UOM. The university also offers PG courses such as MA, MSc, MCom, etc. in distance education mode through the Directorate of Distance Education.

eligibility_selection.title: Mysore University Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: University of Mysore course admissions are entrance-based for most of the courses. The university offers seats based on preset admission criteria. For admission to all PG courses, the university conducts PGEE. Students must also fulfil the basic eligibility specific to the preferred course. The minimum qualification required for Mysore University course admissions is as below:

courses_table.eligibility: UG degree along with Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ Category-I)
courses_table.selection_criteria: MAT, CAT, Karnataka PGCET, XAT, CMAT, GMAT, ATMA, KMAT, KCET, GRE

courses_table.eligibility: Graduation in relevant discipline with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ Category-I)
BE/ BTech degree in the relevant specialisation at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ Category-I)
Class 12 with PCM subjects from a recognised board
BCom/ BBM/ BBA from UOM or any other university with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST/ CAT-I candidates)
B.Ed/ BA B.Ed/ BSc B.Ed/ B.EI.Ed/ D.EI.Ed with at least 50% aggregate
