paragraphs: Mysore University admissionis entrance-based for a majority of courses. Aspirants are selected for admission based on their entrance exam or qualifying exam marks. The process starts with an eligibility check. Eligible students can then apply online. Check below theUniversity of Mysore admission process:
University of Mysore Application Process 2026

Students can apply for any of the UG or PG courses at the official website of UOM. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 300 for UG courses and INR 400 for PG programmes. Besides, aspirants applying for PG programmes also need to fill  the entrance exam form. Candidates, irrespective of their category, have to payINR 1,000separately for the entrance exam andINR 2,000for group subjects.
University of Mysore Selection Process 2026

University of Mysore conducts thePGEEfor all PG courses offered by the university. Besides, the university also accepts national or state-level entrance exams for admission to specific courses. The entrance exams accepted areMAT, CAT, Karnataka PGCET, KCET, etc. Once the candidates are selected, the university releases a merit list.
Admission Confirmation & Seat Allotment 2026

Admission to some of the courses is throughKEA Counselling. After the counselling, candidates are allotted seat in Mysore University. For other courses, candidates must bring their documents for verification and pay theMysore University admissionfeeto confirm their seat in the university.

University of Mysore feesis different for each programme and specialisation. Students need to pay the course fee first at the time of admission. The total fee of UOM includes different components. Some of these are deposit, hostel fee, tuition fee, etc. As per the official site, Cat-I and OBC students, whose annual income is below INR 2.5 and INR 1 lakh, respectively are exempted from payment of tuition fee, lab fee, sports fee, library and examination. There is 50% concession in the tuition fee for SC/ ST students fulfilling the same criteria. Find below theMysore University feesfor some of the top courses:
Note:This information is taken from official sources and can change.

The seat intake for Mysore Courses depends on the specialisation selected by the candidates. Out of the total intake, there are some seats reserved for various categories. Candidates are offered seat in the university based on their qualifying exam or entrance exam scores. Below is theMysore University seat intakepopular courses:
Note:This information is taken from official sources and can change.

Candidates belonging to the reserved category have some seats specifically for them in PG courses. Aspirants must hold the documents supporting their claim. Below is the number of seats for each category:
Note:This information is taken from official sources and can change.

courses_data.description: Mysore University offers two-year MSc course at the PG level. The university offers MSc at the campus and through affiliated colleges in various specialisations such as Biotechnology, Mathematics, Computer Science, Interior Designing and Business Management. The selection for the PG course is entrance-based. Postgraduate Entrance Exam (PGEE) conducted by Mysore University is accepted for MSc admissions. Additionally, for admission toMSc Biotechnology, the university acceptsGAT-Bexam scores.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission to an MSc course at Mysore University?
faqs.answer: University of Mysore conducts Postgraduate Entrance Exam (PGEE) for PG courses admission.PGEEscores are accepted for MSc admission. Candidates have to apply and appear for entrance examinations separately for each program. However, there shall be a single common entrance examination for the following groups of programmes. faqs.question: Can I do MSc correspondence in Mysore University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Mysore University offers two-year MSc IT course in distance education mode through Directorate of Distance University. Aspirants need to complete BSc degree with Computer Science orMathematicsas one of the optional subjects or any degree with Diploma in Computer Application or BCA/ BTech/ BE in any branch with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST/ CAT-I) to apply for MSc IT.

faqs.question: How can I take admission to the University of Mysore in an MSc programme?
faqs.answer: The application form can be filled out in online mode by visiting the university’s official website. During the form filling, candidates must keep the mark sheets and certificates handy. After the conclusion of the application procedure, the university releases a merit list to announce the names of the selected students. Mysore University selects candidates for MSc based on PGEE conducted by the university. For MSc Biotechnology, aspirants are selected based on GAT-B score.

The total fee in Mysore University is a sum of multiple components such as caution deposit, hostel charges, etc. Besides, candidates also need to pay an application fee of INR 400 to register for a PG course at UOM.

faqs.question: Is Mysore University degree valid?
faqs.answer: Mysore University is recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and is accredited with A Grade by the National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC). The University of Mysore has also been ranked 44 in the University category and 71 in the Overall category by NIRF ranking 2023. The university, through its around 228 affiliated colleges and 85 PG departments, offers UG, PG Diploma PG Diploma and Certificate courses to the students. Some of the names of the top recruiters who visited the campus for placements include Infosys, TCS, Wipro, IBM, EY, HCL, etc.

faqs.question: What are the courses that University of Mysore offers?
faqs.answer: The University of Mysore has undergraduate (UG),  (PG) postgraduate, & research programmes available for students. Some of the streams are Humanities, Arts, Science, Law, Commerce, IT and Software, Business Management, and Education. The duration of these courses ranges between one to 5 years. The entrance examinations accepted include CMAT, GMAT, MAT, CAT, Karnataka PGCET XAT, etc.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in University of Mysore?
faqs.answer: Aspirants must start by filling out the application form online. Mysore University admissions are mostly based on entrance-exam score. The university conducts Postgraduate Entrance Exam (PGEE) for all PG courses offered by the university. Besides, the university also accepts national or state-level entrance exams for admission to specific courses. The entrance exams accepted are MAT, CAT, Karnataka PGCET, KCET, etc. Once the candidates are selected, the university releases a merit list.

placement_data.title: University of Mysore Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The placement details of 2025 batch are yet to be released on the official website of University of Mysore. However, the institute has released the NIRF report 2025 which includes the placement details for the batch 2024. According to the report, 4 UG 4 year students were placed out of the total 8 graduated students during University of Mysore placements 2024 with a median package of INR 4.75 LPA . In UG 5-year program, 42 students of the batch 2024 got placements with a median salary of INR 5.25 LPA.

In PG 1-year program , 49 students of the batch 2024 were placed with a median salary of INR 2.35 LPA. Further, 1983 students from the PG 2 year batch 2024 secured placements with the median salary of INR 3.8 LPA. Some of the top recruiters of Mysore University in therecent past include Wipro, TCS, IBM, Infosys, TCS, ONGC , etc.

description: University of Mysore cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to various UG and PG courses. Candidates can refer to the sections below to view the cutoff details for various accepting exams across different courses, rounds and categories. Further updates are below:

The university offers MBA/ PGDM courses through affiliated colleges. As per the University of Mysore cutoff 2024, candidates looking for admission to an MBA are required to score a rank of 11980 for the General category in Karnataka PGCET for admission to Yuvarajas College, whereas for SBRR Mahajana First Grade College, candidates must have 11924. highlights.description: University of Mysore has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #71 in the University category, and #20 under State Public University by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around University of Mysore rankings:

rankings.highlight: Best Among India Today Ranked Colleges In Karnataka In 2025
9th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Karnataka In 2025

nirf.description:
University of Mysore has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for University of Mysore indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, University of Mysore climbed -15 ranks to #101 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, University of Mysore fell 17 ranks to #71 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
The institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'State Public University' category when compared with the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, University of Mysore fell 1 rank to #20 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
Based on the rankings from QS World University Rankings, University of Mysore outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the QS World University Rankings system. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2026, University of Mysore fell 154 ranks to #675 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, University of Mysore fell 58 ranks to #206 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Discover the latest rankings and categories provided by other ranking bodies listed below.

hostel_campus.college_name: University of Mysore India  Infrastructure: Campus Facilities

hostel.description: The University maintains seven Men’s hostels and four Women’s hostels. All the hostels have basic amenities like water purifiers, common room, recreation room, mess, TV, laundry services, security, and surveillance system etc.For International Students there are two International Hostels with 90 spacious rooms, each with a balcony opening to the picturesque Kukkarahalli Lake. The independent rooms are equipped with space for study, internet connectivity, kitchenette facility, attached washrooms and enclosed chests for safekeeping of belongings. The International Hostel also houses two computer labs and a spacious dining hall cum kitchen complex. Students pursuing only Diploma/ Certificate courses are not eligible for hostel facilities.

library.description: The library has a collection of more than 7,00,000 books. It currently subscribes to more than 225 Indian Journals, 16 foreign journals, 24 popular magazines and 20 newspapers. Hostel facilities for boys and girls are available and are decent and comfortable, though basic in nature. The mess foo...

reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure at AIISH are vast and impressive. It includes Wi-Fi everywhere, practical labs, patient exposure, good classrooms, and a large collection of books in the library. The library here is one of the biggest in Asia.

reviews.review_heading: It has really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: We have high-quality Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, etc. The hostel is good. The food is amazing. We support a lot of sports and activities. The quality of facilities in the hostel is quite good. The mess and the food, everything is pretty good.

reviews.review_text: The college provided very hygienic and tasty food. The infrastructure was Wi-Fi-based. There were top-rated co-curricular activities and good hostel facilities with a hygienic mess. Parking was also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by JSS College of Arts, Commerce and Science (JSSCACS)

The administration office is frustratingly slow and poorly managed, requiring long waits even for basic tasks like registration, payments, or obtaining a certificate. But I guess most colleges in Karnataka are like that. I've heard the hostel food is horrible in the girls' hostel. Classrooms had pr...

reviews.review_heading: Good college, infrastructure, and placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi all over the campus with CCTV security. Classrooms are top-notch, and all facilities, like projectors and smart boards, are available. The library is good, and all types of books and magazines are available. Hostels are good. There are 2-seated and 3-seated rooms. There are different grounds for different sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by NIT Surathkal - National Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 15 Nov 2025)

reviews.review_text: The hostels have facilities like Wi-Fi, drinking water, light, fans, and beds. The classrooms are air-conditioned, and the central library is well-equipped for borrowing books. The mess food is average, but there are three canteens serving really tasty fast food. There is also a small sports field for volleyball, football, and cricket.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Yuvarajas College, University of MysoreReviewed on 10 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with teaching of faculty members and nice lab with all the instruments.

They maintained very clean and organized study corners for the students who studied. They offered a computer to search any kind of topic if we need.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by NIT Surathkal - National Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 14 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of NIT Surathkal College.
reviews.review_text: Now, our course definitely benefits from some great facilities and infrastructure. The campus had a central library, Wi-Fi access, and digital classrooms, which was nice. The hostel accommodation was quite good, and the meals were pretty tasty, whether you were eating at the mess or the canteen. Don't forget the multi-sports complex!

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by NIT Surathkal - National Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 27 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: National Institute of Technology, Suratkal
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good, and infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is provided and very useful for networking. In labs, AC and projectors are provided. Classrooms are good, and AC and projectors are provided for display. The library is good and provides AC and projectors. Hostel is good, with quality food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2018Offered by JSS College of Arts, Commerce and Science (JSSCACS)
reviews.review_heading: It's up to you to choose the campus.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good at a graduation college. Classrooms are decent. Labs are spacious and have all facilities like water and gas connections. Wi-Fi is only in the classrooms. The library is good, and all types of books and study materials are available. There are two hostels, one boys' hostel and a girls' hostel, inside the campus. Food is average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by NIT Surathkal - National Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 14 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: NIT Surathkal College Review.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available all across campus, and the hostels have LAN, too. The labs were fully stocked and really good. The library had over 200,000 books on just about every topic you can think of. I would have to say, when it comes to food, I would give it a 2 out of 5. The medical and sports facilities were pretty solid overall. The second year student hostels arena. It was the best, but the others were just fine. The food was decent, too.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by NIT Surathkal - National Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 14 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: NIT Surathkal College review.
reviews.review_text: The campus includes all the essential academic and research buildings, a central library, well equipped labs, and classrooms with Wi-Fi. Students could use residential facilities and dining halls. The hostel accommodation was generally seen as satisfactory. The food in the mess was just average. It was a health center with medical professionals available, in case someone got sick.

data.description: For the holistic development of the students, the university has a separate cell called the Directorate of Physical Education, which looks after the sports-related events. The University of Mysore sports facilities include three cricket grounds, four tennis courts, a cinder track, three basketball courts , etc. It also has Nalwadi Krishnaraja Wadiyar, Gangotri Glades, and three indoor stadiums. A well-equipped large gymnasium and a well-maintained swimming pool are also available for the students to focus on their physical health.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Animation and Film Making - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with faculty but not with placement.

review_content.Placements: As per I know, almost 85% of students were placed in our course every year with no issue, but the others were not satisfied with their placement package, so they don't want to continue with the provided placement. In our course, the highest starting package was 10.2 Lacs per annum offered by Amazon. A minimum I have heard about was 2.3 Lacs per annum, which is very low. But the average salary of our course could be around 4.2 Lacs per annum.
review_content.Infrastructure: If I want to tell about the infrastructure of my college, then I should say it is really good. Being a student of a digital media course, we always need good computer machinery and strong Wi-Fi connectivity, which I must say our college didn’t fail to provide. The classrooms and labs are well-suited for use. Yes, there were some technical issues that occurred regarding classroom projectors and computers, but it was always fixed in no time. Being a student of an Animation and Filmmaking course, we really don’t need a library, so I can’t tell anything about this. I really don’t feel the need for a hostel, so I can’t tell anything about it. And I don’t think our college really has any hostel facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: My personal 3 years experience about IMS I have shared. Check my review before admission.

review_content.Placements: The placement experience was very bad. Some companies came, but the package was too low. The average salary per month starts from 8000 rupees. Companies like HDFC and some software companies came, but we never got any internships. The top role offered was sales manager, and zero students got placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel available, and no mess either. The canteen is available, but the prices are too expensive. Medical facilities are available, but there is no playing ground and no outdoor or indoor games. Wi-Fi is available, but no one gives the Wi-Fi password. I got a password from a teacher, but the Wi-Fi speed is very slow.

review_summary.college_name: IMS Kolkata Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Animation and Film Making - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great learning experience with supportive faculty.

content.Placements: B.Sc. Animation offers strong placements with 70-90% of students placed. Top recruiters include Disney Hotstar, Red Chillies, Netflix India, Amazon Prime Video, Technicolor, and Ubisoft. Common roles are 3D animator, game animator/designer, storyboard artist, and character designer.
content.Infrastructure: The department offers good infrastructure with smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, modern labs, and a well-stocked library. Hostel facilities are comfortable and safe, the mess food is hygienic though sometimes repetitive. The canteen provides extra choices.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in VFX and Film Making - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with the infrastructure.

content.Placements: There are a minimum of 40 students per batch. The highest package offered is 4 LPA. Roles offered in our course are roto artists, comp artists, paint artists, etc. The recruiting companies are from outside Kolkata. Companies like MPC, Feather VFX India, etc., visit the college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: There are facilities like each student got a separate computer for their work in the college in the lab. There is no hostel facility in our college. We have to find a hostel on our own or rent a room. The college has a canteen but it is not owned by the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Animation and Film Making - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with faculty but not with placement.

content.Placements: As per I know, almost 85% of students were placed in our course every year with no issue, but the others were not satisfied with their placement package, so they don't want to continue with the provided placement. In our course, the highest starting package was 10.2 Lacs per annum offered by Amazon. A minimum I have heard about was 2.3 Lacs per annum, which is very low. But the average salary of our course could be around 4.2 Lacs per annum.
content.Infrastructure: If I want to tell about the infrastructure of my college, then I should say it is really good. Being a student of a digital media course, we always need good computer machinery and strong Wi-Fi connectivity, which I must say our college didn’t fail to provide. The classrooms and labs are well-suited for use. Yes, there were some technical issues that occurred regarding classroom projectors and computers, but it was always fixed in no time. Being a student of an Animation and Filmmaking course, we really don’t need a library, so I can’t tell anything about this. I really don’t feel the need for a hostel, so I can’t tell anything about it. And I don’t think our college really has any hostel facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My personal 3 years experience about IMS I have shared. Check my review before admission.

content.Placements: The placement experience was very bad. Some companies came, but the package was too low. The average salary per month starts from 8000 rupees. Companies like HDFC and some software companies came, but we never got any internships. The top role offered was sales manager, and zero students got placed.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel available, and no mess either. The canteen is available, but the prices are too expensive. Medical facilities are available, but there is no playing ground and no outdoor or indoor games. Wi-Fi is available, but no one gives the Wi-Fi password. I got a password from a teacher, but the Wi-Fi speed is very slow.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A quick review of IMS Kolkata.

content.Placements: The placement of this college is better than that of the other colleges. They provide us with a good range of placements. Approximately 60–70% of students were placed on campus. Packages are around 2–3 LPA. Some of the of the top recruiters are Wipro, Tech Mahindra, and Quick.com. Also, they provide some internship facilities.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is average because of this environment. The college is near the road so many noises are created so the students may not be comfortable with this and cannot be properly focused on studying. Wi-fi and air conditioning facilities are available. The library is good, with more than 5000 books. Sports facilities are available.

admission_overview.college_name: IMS Kolkata Courses Admission 2025: Last date, Fees, Eligibility, Application Process

paragraphs: Institute of Management Study (IMS), Kolkata is affiliated toMaulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology. IMS Kolkata offers around thirteen courses including Management, Hotel Management, Science, Computer and IT, Accounting and Commerce, etc.IMS Kolkataadmission is merit as well as entrance-based. The application process includes an online application.

IMS Kolkata Admission 2025 is open. The college offers MBA, BBA, BSc, MHA, BMLT, and BOPTM as popular courses for students. The candidates willing to get admission to the college can apply online through the official website of the institute. Check out the table below for admission highlights of IMS Kolkata:
Particulars
IMS Kolkata Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
13+ courses across multiple specialisations
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Admission to the flagship course is based on a valid score obtained by the candidates in the entrance exams along with other selection rounds such as Group Discussion(GD) and personal Interview (PI). Admission to all the courses offered byIMS Kolkata coursesis subject to merit in the entrance exam, selection rounds, and past academics. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria for all programmes:
Bachelor's Degree from a recognised university
Master's degree in the relevant discipline

The admission process for IMS Kolkata is a multi-step process inclusive of application, appearance in the selection rounds, offline admission process, and document verification. A step-by-step process that students need to follow is as follows:
STEP 1: IMS Kolkata Application Process 2025

The application process for all programmes at IMS Kolkata is done online. Candidates can fill out the IMS Kolkata application form 2025 on the official website for the respective course accepting exam as given above. The registration fee for all programmes varies as per the counselling bodies & official website of IMS Kolkata.
STEP 2: IMS Kolkata Selection Process 2025

Candidates who've applied for any course at IMS Kolkata must appear for the entrance exam or qualifying exam as per the respective course. After qualifying the minimum eligibility criteria, candidates have to appear for the Group Discussion and Personal Interview. The shortlisted candidates will be selected for the course.
STEP 3: IMS Kolkata Document Verification & Payment of Admission Fee

Candidates shortlisted as per the merit lists will have to submit the prescribed admission fee for the particular course. Following this, candidates are required to go through the document verification and are intimated about the date of commencement of the classes.

faqs.question: What is the frequency of the MAKAUT CET exam?
faqs.answer: The Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology Common Entrance Test MAKAUT CET is conducted once every year. Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology Common Entrance Test is an all-India level examination for admission to the MAKAUT (the Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology) and its affiliated colleges. For more details, you may visit the Shiksha MAKAUT CET exam page. (https://www.shiksha.com/university/maulana-abul-kalam-azad-university-of-technology/makaut-cet-exam).

placement_data.title: IMS Kolkata Placement overview 2024
paragraphs: The placement details for the academic year 2023-24 has been released. As per the report, the highest and average packages offered to the MBA students were INR 1.90 LPA and INR 1.78 LPA , respectively. In addition to this, 21 out of 30 BBA students were placed . The highest package offered during IMS Kolkata placements 2024 for BBA was INR 1.82 LPA . The overall highest package stood at INR 2.30 LPA and was offered to MHA students.

tables.context: What is the highest package offered at IMS Kolkata
How are the placements at IMS Kolkata?
data: ICICI Bank, Tata Medical Center, Radisson Agra

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at IMS Kolkata?
faqs.answer: The overall highest package offered to the 2024 batch was INR 2.30 LPA and was made to MHA students. Earlier, the highest package offered in 2023 was INR 2.85 LPA. The table below showcases the IMS Kolkata highest package trends for various courses: Course Highest Package (2022) Highest Package (2023) Highest Package (2024) MBA N/A INR 1.85 LPA INR 1.90 LPA BBA INR 1.80 LPA INR 2.85 LPA INR 1.82 LPA MHA INR 2.16 LPA INR 1.96 LPA INR 2.30 LPA BBA HHA N/A INR 1.78 LPA INR 1.80 LPA BCA INR 2.16 LPA INR 1.85 LPA INR 1.85 LPA BTTM INR 1.20 LPA INR 1.92 LPA INR 1.92 LPA BBA HM INR 1.44 LPA INR 2 LPA INR 2.10 LPA MPH N/A N/A INR 1.85 LPA

faqs.question: How are the placements at IMS Kolkata?
faqs.answer: The institute has released the course-wise placement data for 2024. Out of 275 students in the 2024 batch, 177 were successfully placed. The overall highest package stood at INR 2.30 LPA. Check the complete insights of IMS Kolkata placements 2024 from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2024) Highest package INR 2.30 LPA Average package* INR 2.10 LPA Total students 275 Students placed 177 Popular recruiters ICICI Bank, Tata Medical Center, Radisson Agra *The average package mentioned above is the highest of all the average salaries offered in different courses.

faqs.question: What is the average package for MBA students at IMS - Institute of Management Study?
faqs.answer: The average package or average salary offered to the MBA students at IMS Institute of Management Study is between INR 8 to 10 Lacs per anum. The highest salary offered to the MBA students at IMS gaziabad was INR 28 Lacs per anum which is high rated salary package offered to the students. This is the descent college and offers descent salary to the students. Almost 80 to 90 percent get campus placement because of reputation of this college.

faqs.answer: Fee for IMS Kolkata for two years is INR 5.00 Lakh, IMS offers different specialisation for MBA like- Marketing, HR, Operations, Finance, Business Analytics, MIS and E-MBA. hostel_campus.college_name: IMS Kolkata Infrastructure Details & Reviews

library.description: The Library of Institute of Management Study is fully equipped with around 10,000 textbooks, several national and international journals, magazines, online journals on management, computer applications, and technology.

The Library of Institute of Management Study is fully equipped with around 10,000 textbooks, several national and international journals, magazines, online journals on management, computer applications, and technology.

reviews.review_heading: Great learning experience with supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: The department offers good infrastructure with smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, modern labs, and a well-stocked library. Hostel facilities are comfortable and safe, the mess food is hygienic though sometimes repetitive. The canteen provides extra choices.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There are facilities like each student got a separate computer for their work in the college in the lab. There is no hostel facility in our college. We have to find a hostel on our own or rent a room. The college has a canteen but it is not owned by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty but not with placement.
reviews.review_text: If I want to tell about the infrastructure of my college, then I should say it is really good. Being a student of a digital media course, we always need good computer machinery and strong Wi-Fi connectivity, which I must say our college didn’t fail to provide. The classrooms and labs are well-suited for use. Yes, there were some technical issues that occurred regarding classroom projectors and computers, but it was always fixed in no time. Being a student of an Animation and Filmmaking course, w...

reviews.review_heading: My personal 3 years experience about IMS I have shared. Check my review before admission.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel available, and no mess either. The canteen is available, but the prices are too expensive. Medical facilities are available, but there is no playing ground and no outdoor or indoor games. Wi-Fi is available, but no one gives the Wi-Fi password. I got a password from a teacher, but the Wi-Fi speed is very slow.

reviews.review_heading: A quick review of IMS Kolkata.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is average because of this environment. The college is near the road so many noises are created so the students may not be comfortable with this and cannot be properly focused on studying. Wi-fi and air conditioning facilities are available. The library is good, with more than 5000 books. Sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for BCA courses.
reviews.review_text: The college provides decent infrastructure for BCA students, with well-equipped computer labs, classrooms with Wi-Fi connectivity, and a comprehensive library stocked with relevant books and research materials. Hostel facilities offer comfortable accommodation with regular maintenance, though improvements in amenities such as the quality of food in the mess and canteen could be made. Medical facilities are available on campus, albeit basic, and there are opportunities for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: The best College for the BCA course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the BCA department at the Institute of Management Studies in Kolkata is commendable. We have well-equipped computer labs with high-speed Wi-Fi, modern classrooms, and an extensive library with relevant resources. The hostel facilities are decent, providing comfortable accommodation. The mess and canteen offer a variety of nutritious meals, although there's room for improvement in terms of variety. Medical facilities are readily available on campus, and there are ample oppo...

reviews.review_heading: The best college for B.Sc. in Critical Care course.
reviews.review_text: The institute provides excellent infrastructure for our course, equipped with state-of-the-art laboratories, advanced medical equipment, and simulation rooms to facilitate practical learning. The classrooms are spacious and well-equipped with audio-visual aids, enhancing the learning experience. The library is stocked with relevant books, journals, and online resources catering to our academic needs. Hostel facilities are decent with good Wi-Fi connectivity, and the mess serves nutritious meals....

reviews.review_heading: The best college for B.Sc. in Medical Instrumentation course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course is commendable. We have well-equipped labs with the latest medical instrumentation, high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity across the campus, modern classrooms conducive to learning, and a vast library stocked with relevant books and journals. Hostel facilities are satisfactory with comfortable accommodation, decent mess, and a canteen offering hygienic food, basic medical facilities, and ample space for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for B.Sc. in Medical Lab Technology course.
reviews.review_text: The Institute of Management Studies in Kolkata provides excellent infrastructure for the B.Sc.  in Medical Lab Technology course. The department is equipped with state-of-the-art laboratories, modern classrooms with audio-visual aids, and a well-stocked library. Wi-Fi connectivity is available across the campus. Hostel facilities are satisfactory, with clean rooms and adequate amenities. The mess and canteen serve nutritious and hygienic food. Medical facilities are easily accessible, and there ...

reviews.review_heading: The best college for B.Sc.  Medical Instrumentation and Critical Care Technology course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course is commendable. We have well-equipped labs with the latest instruments, spacious classrooms with AV facilities, and a vast library stocked with relevant books and research papers. The campus provides reliable Wi-Fi connectivity, Facilitating research and project work. The hostel facilities are satisfactory, with decent accommodation and hygiene standards. The mess and canteen offer a variety of nutritious meals at reasonable prices. Medical facilities on campus ...

reviews.review_heading: The best college for B.Sc.  in Medical Instrumentation and Critical Care Technology course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course is commendable. We have well-equipped labs with the latest medical instrumentation, high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity across the campus, modern classrooms conducive to learning, and a vast library stocked with relevant books and journals. Hostel facilities are satisfactory with comfortable accommodation, decent mess and a canteen offering hygienic food.

reviews.review_heading: Review about Institute of management study.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility was available for the students in the college. The labs are big and lab facility was available for the students in the lab. The library has a reading room for the students. All subjects books are available for the students in the library. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review about Institute of management study.
reviews.review_text: Students at this college have access to Wi-Fi, spacious labs with all necessary facilities, large classrooms equipped with benches and desks, and a library with a dedicated reading room. The hostel provides good-quality facilities, while the mess and canteen offer satisfactory food options. Additionally, medical facilities are available for students at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review about Institute of Management Study.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility was available for the students in this college. The labs are big and all lab facilities are available for the students in the lab. The classrooms are big and the classrooms are cleaned everyday. The library was big and all subjects books are available for the students in the library. The quality of facilities in our hostel was good.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: SRM IST Delhi-NCR Campus, Ghaziabad offers UG, PG, and PhD programmes to students. These courses are provided across the Management, Engineering, and various other streams. At the UG level, the university offers BTech courses to students. At the PG level, the university offers MTech, MSc, , and other courses to students. The university also provides PhD programmes to students. Below mentioned are some of the SRM IST Delhi-NCR Campus, Ghaziabad courses and their respective eligibility and SRM Ghaziabad fees:

faqs.answer: A:    SRM University Delhi NCR can be considered moderately costly compared to other private engineering colleges in India. The exact fee structure (in INR) will depend on the programme you choose.Undergraduate programs range from 1.11 Lacs to 2.21 Lacs per year. B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering with specialisation in Cloud Engineering, DevOps, Automation, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence. BA (Hons) in Psychology costs 91,000 per year. Postgraduate programs range from 2.21 Lacs to 5.17 Lacs per year. MBA costs 4.17 Lacs to 5.17 Lacs per year, while M.Tech in Civil Engineering costs 2.21 Lacs per year.Other fees include:Admission fee: 1,100Hostel fee: 80,000 - 1,20,000 per year (Mandatory for the first year)Mess fee: 30,000 - 40,000 per year
faqs.question: How costly is SRM University Delhi NCR?

faqs.answer: A:    The admissions to SRM University Delhi NCR are entrance-based as well as merit-based. Entrance exams like SRMJEEE, JEE Main, NEET, or SRMHCAT are required for most courses, but the admissions office considers merit-based admissions for those candidates with extraordinary academic performance or on certain conditions. Check the criteria for your course of interest with the admissions office for details.
faqs.question: Are admissions at SRM University Delhi NCR entrance-based or merit-based?

faqs.answer: A:    The admission to MBA is based on CAT/ NMAT/ CMAT/ GMAT/ MAT/ XAT/ SRMHCAT scores followed by an interview round. Admission will be done through SRM Joint Entrance Examination for Management (SRMJEEM) followed by a Personal Interview. Students with eligible entrance scores in CAT/SAT/MAT/GMAT/NMAT/CMAT/TANCET may also apply. 3. Preference would be given to candidates with work experience.Best regards.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does SRM University Delhi NCR accept for admission to MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    The selection process for MBA in SRM University Delhi NCR may have its admission criteria for MBA programs, including the Xavier Aptitude Test (XAT) percentile requirement.The minimum of 70 percentile is required at SRM University Delhi NCR. This was one of the best Universities for MBA but expensive compared to others.Basic eligibility criteria to get admission at SRM university is 50 percent along with score in any of these entrance exams- CAT,XAT,MAT,NMAT,CMAT.Best regards.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is an average college but much more expensive.

review_content.Placements: In the 2024 placement session, the highest package awarded is 18 LPA. The average package ranges from 7-8 LPA. The lowest package ranges from 3-4 LPA. Almost 60% of students get placed within campus during the placement drive. The top recruiting companies for our course are Amazon, Microsoft, TCS, and JP Morgan. Around 70-80% of students got internships in companies like Microsoft, Deloitte, HP, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is accessible to all students on campus in either classrooms or library or hostel with good speed. Labs are well established with most labs having capacities of up to 60 students with high-speed internet and fast computers. Some labs have IMac installed and the rest of the majority are Lenovo. Classrooms are not so good looking but every classroom has AC installed. The library has access to almost every book a person would want from fiction to study-related. Hostels are well established providing students with average quality food. It has sports facilities and free medical assistance.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: SRM Ghaziabad offers decent academic knowledge and a supportive faculty.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 65% of students are placed. The highest package is 18 LPA, the average package is 7–8 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. SRM Ghaziabad (SRM Delhi-NCR) placement statistics show recent B.Tech (CSE) placements with an 18 LPA highest package and a 7–8 LPA average package, while BBA placements record a 7 LPA highest package. The institute has a Career Development Center that provides support like career counseling, guest lectures, and industry exposure to help students find employment.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are excellent. Wi-Fi is not very good, but they provide their best. Labs are very good and provide Lenovo ThinkPad and Apple MacBook Air. The library provides good books for 15 days. Canteen food is very good, and the prices are not expensive.

course_faqs.question: Is it easy to pursue BPharm course at SRM IST Delhi-NCR Campus, Ghaziabad?
course_faqs.answer: The difficulty of a BPharm programme at SRM IST Delhi-NCR Campus, Ghaziabad can vary depending on a student's aptitude, interest, and study habits. A solid understanding of both Science and mathematics is necessary for a variety of topics covered in BPharm courses, such as pharmacology, medicinal chemistry, pharmaceutical engineering, and biochemistry. A solid foundation in these areas and a sincere interest in the subject are important to make BPharma courses easy to handle.

overview_faqs.question: How costly is SRM University Delhi NCR?
overview_faqs.answer: SRM University Delhi NCR can be considered moderately costly compared to other private engineering colleges in India. The exact fee structure (in INR) will depend on the programme you choose.Undergraduate programs range from 1.11 Lacs to 2.21 Lacs per year. B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering with specialisation in Cloud Engineering, DevOps, Automation, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence. BA (Hons) in Psychology costs 91,000 per year. Postgraduate programs range from 2.21 Lacs to 5.17 Lacs per year. MBA costs 4.17 Lacs to 5.17 Lacs per year, while M.Tech in Civil Engineering costs 2.21 Lacs per year.Other fees include:Admission fee: 1,100Hostel fee: 80,000 - 1,20,000 per year (Mandatory for the first year)Mess fee: 30,000 - 40,000 per year

review_summary.college_name: SRM IST Delhi-NCR Campus, Ghaziabad Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I shouldn't have come here. Decent infrastructure, bad hostels, and very average placement.

content.Placements: The exact percent of students placed is a mystery, because here they follow the unethical practice of banning you from placements, meaning if you're getting a 4 LPA package. You think you deserve more. If you say no, they blacklist you, meaning you won't be allowed to sit in the placements anymore, and you will also not be counted towards the no of students who applied for placement, so their selection percentage goes high. The highest I know of is 36 LPA off campus, and 24 on campus by Amazon, the lowest it goes down to 3.6 LPA, and the average is 7 LPA.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Best for CSE students with good placement offers.

content.Placements: The placement cell is very good. The placement percentage varies from batch to batch, as it depends on the students' knowledge. Bringing companies to the university is the responsibility of the university, and they fulfill it efficiently. One of the highest packages in my branch, Cybersecurity, is 50 LPA. Recruiters include big companies like Microsoft, Amazon, Adobe, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: I'm basically a day scholar, but my friends have reviewed it, and it is really good. You can't make fun of the rooms, as most people/students do. The sports facility on the campus is quite good, with regular tournaments held on campus and at the hostel. Gym facilities are also quite good, with a trainer provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is an average college but much more expensive.

content.Placements: In the 2024 placement session, the highest package awarded is 18 LPA. The average package ranges from 7-8 LPA. The lowest package ranges from 3-4 LPA. Almost 60% of students get placed within campus during the placement drive. The top recruiting companies for our course are Amazon, Microsoft, TCS, and JP Morgan. Around 70-80% of students got internships in companies like Microsoft, Deloitte, HP, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is accessible to all students on campus in either classrooms or library or hostel with good speed. Labs are well established with most labs having capacities of up to 60 students with high-speed internet and fast computers. Some labs have IMac installed and the rest of the majority are Lenovo. Classrooms are not so good looking but every classroom has AC installed. The library has access to almost every book a person would want from fiction to study-related. Hostels are well established providing students with average quality food. It has sports facilities and free medical assistance.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: SRM Ghaziabad offers decent academic knowledge and a supportive faculty.

content.Placements: Approximately 65% of students are placed. The highest package is 18 LPA, the average package is 7–8 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. SRM Ghaziabad (SRM Delhi-NCR) placement statistics show recent B.Tech (CSE) placements with an 18 LPA highest package and a 7–8 LPA average package, while BBA placements record a 7 LPA highest package. The institute has a Career Development Center that provides support like career counseling, guest lectures, and industry exposure to help students find employment.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are excellent. Wi-Fi is not very good, but they provide their best. Labs are very good and provide Lenovo ThinkPad and Apple MacBook Air. The library provides good books for 15 days. Canteen food is very good, and the prices are not expensive.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college and decent crowd with good classrooms and labs, but no fest and events.

content.Placements: My college provides various course, and I am currently pursuing B.Tech CSE AIML. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, etc. The highest package is around 30 LPA, and the lowest is 3.5 LPA. B.Tech CSE also offers B.Tech CSE AIML, B.Tech CSE, data science, B.Tech CSE, and cloud computing.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel infrastructure is quite decent, not as luxurious. We have mess hall in hostel. There are various canteens from which students can buy food and also quench their thirst. In my course, there is good Wi-Fi, lab classes, and good Wi-Fi speed. We have good benches in classroom.

admission_overview.college_name: SRM IST Delhi-NCR Campus, Ghaziabad Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

admission_process.title: SRM IST Delhi-NCR Campus, Ghaziabad Admission process 2025

paragraphs: SRM IST admission 2025is based on both merit and entrance exams. The institute offersmore than ten coursesat undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral levels. The courses are offered in various fields such as Engineering and Technology,Management, Computer Applications,Pharmacy, andHotel Management. Admission toSRM IST flagship BTechcourse is entrance-based. The institute conductsSRMJEEEfor admission to the BTech programme. Candidates with a validJEE Main scoreare not required to appear for SRMJEEE and are given direct admission to the course. Similarly, for admission to theSRM IST MBA course, the institute conductsSRMJEE-Mand accepts valid scores inCAT/ TANCET/ XAT/ MAT/ GMAT/ NMAT/ CMAT.
SRM Institute of Science is deemed to be a university thatoffersAICTE-approved courses. The institute is also approved by the PCI and has gotA++ grade by NAAC.

The basic eligibility criteria for SRM University UG courses is class 12 in the relevant stream from a recognised board. For admission to the PG course, the minimum educational requirement is graduation in a relevant discipline from a recognised institute. Interested candidates can check the table below for detailedSRM IST course eligibility and selection criteria:

SRM IST admission processusually begins in the month ofMarchwith the release of SRMU application forms. The admission criteria for SRM IST courses are both merit-based and entrance-based. In case of merit-based courses, admissions are granted based on the fulfilment of the eligibility criteria and availability of seats. Admission to courses such as BTech, MBA, and MTech is entrance-based.
Interested candidates can check below the step-wiseSRM IST admission process 2025:
Step 1: Application Process

The SRM IST application process is conducted online on the official website of the institute. Interested candidates are required to fill out the application form, after meeting the eligibility criteria of their desired course, and pay the required application fee. TheSRM IST application fee is INR 1,200for all courses.
Step 2: Selection Process
Step 3: Final Admission

headings.text: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Admission 2025: Eligibility and Selection Criteria
SRM Institute of Science and Technology Admission Process 2025

lists: For BTech, MBA and MTech- Admission is done through National level entrance examination (SRMJEEE , SRMJEEE(PG), SRMJEE M) conducted by SRM Institute of Science and Technology or authorized /statutory boards or agencies. Apart from the SRM entrance exams, the institute also accepts various national-level entrance exams such as CAT, TANCET,XAT,MAT,GMAT, JEE Main etc. In addition to the above, the eligibility for admission is subject to fulfilling the requirement of minimum marks in the qualifying examination.
For other courses- Fulfilling the eligibility criteria and Subject to the availability of seats at that point of time, Candidates will be called for counselling.
Upon selection of the programme, tuition fees and other applicable fees have to be paid at the time of counselling
A Provisional Allotment Letter (PAL) will be issued to confirm the candidate's admission.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in SRM University Delhi NCR for BTech?
faqs.answer: No, direct admission for BTech at SRM University Delhi NCR is not possiblw without taking SRMJEEE or JEE Main exam. The aspiring candidates must have a minimum of 60% aggregate in Class 12 with Physics, Mathematics, and another relevant subject.

Apart from SRMJEEM, the institute also acceptsCAT /TANCET /XAT /MAT /GMAT /NMAT /CMATscores to shortlist candidates for the next round. faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at SRM University Delhi NCR?
faqs.answer: The selection process for MBA in SRM University Delhi NCR may have its admission criteria for MBA programs, including the Xavier Aptitude Test (XAT) percentile requirement.The minimum of 70 percentile is required at SRM University Delhi NCR. This was one of the best Universities for MBA but expensive compared to others.Basic eligibility criteria to get admission at SRM university is 50 percent along with score in any of these entrance exams- CAT,XAT,MAT,NMAT,CMAT.Best regards.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does SRM University Delhi NCR accept for admission to MBA?
faqs.answer: The admission to MBA is based on CAT/ NMAT/ CMAT/ GMAT/ MAT/ XAT/ SRMHCAT scores followed by an interview round. Admission will be done through SRM Joint Entrance Examination for Management (SRMJEEM) followed by a Personal Interview. Students with eligible entrance scores in CAT/SAT/MAT/GMAT/NMAT/CMAT/TANCET may also apply. 3. Preference would be given to candidates with work experience.Best regards.

faqs.question: How can I apply for SRM IST Delhi-NCR Campus, Ghaziabad in Delhi?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have missed the entrance exams must not worry. These candidates can apply again the next year. Candidates willing get admission must take part in the SRM IST Delhi-NCR Campus, Ghaziabad admission process before the last date of application. Candidates must know their SRM IST Delhi-NCR Campus, Ghaziabad eligibility criteria and apply accordingly. Follow the SRM IST Delhi-NCR Campus, Ghaziabad application process mentioned below:Step 1:Visit the official website of SRM IST Ghaziabad

faqs.question: Can I join SRM University Delhi NCR directly?
faqs.answer: SRM University Delhi NCR takes students for admissions based on entrance exams. However, it can provide direct admission under management quota or merit-based criteria or if seats are vacant. Such admissions usually require extra fees. Make sure that you meet the eligibility criteria for your preferred course.

faqs.question: Are admissions at SRM University Delhi NCR entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: The admissions to SRM University Delhi NCR are entrance-based as well as merit-based. Entrance exams like SRMJEEE, JEE Main, NEET, or SRMHCAT are required for most courses, but the admissions office considers merit-based admissions for those candidates with extraordinary academic performance or on certain conditions. Check the criteria for your course of interest with the admissions office for details.

faqs.question: Can I join SRM IST Delhi-NCR Campus, Ghaziabad directly?
faqs.answer: SRM IST Delhi-NCR Campus, Ghaziabad admissions are based on the entrance exams and there is no provision of direct admission. The mode of SRM IST Delhi-NCR Campus, Ghaziabad course admissions is online. Admission to various courses is based on entrance exam scores and merit. The accepted entrance exams areJEE Main,SRMJEEE, and others. Candidates applying through JEE Main must first register for the JEE Main exams. Then appear for the JEE Main exam. Then with valid scores apply on the official website of the university.

placement_data.title: SRM IST Delhi-NCR Campus, Ghaziabad Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: A total of 625 students were eligible for the 2024 drive. Out of these, 343 students were placed from BTech , MBA , and other courses during SRMIST placements 2024. The overall highest package offered was INR 18 LPA . In addition to this, the institute witnessed the participation of over 958 companies from diverse sectors. The total count of job offers made was above 6,285 .

At SRM Institute of Science and Technology (Deemed to be University), students get opportunities across a wide range of industries and companies visiting the campus every year with attractive salary packages and profiles to match students’ expectations. The University has a Career Development Centre & Placement Department that provides an interface between the academics and the corporate world.

hostel.description: SRM, Modi Nagar hostels can accommodate around 1800 students. Hostel rooms are allotted on first come first basis and are available on double or triple sharing basis. All the hostels are equipped with facilities like indoor and outdoor games, medical facilities, mess, security and surveillance system etc.

library.description: SRM, Modi Nagar central library has more than 38734 books, journals, magazines, interesting computerized online systems, audio-visual material and CD-ROMs. It is completed computerized and students can have e-access of e-journals, e-books and projects etc. It has a subscription of online DELNET database.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Language Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab, Food Production Lab, Front Office Lab, House keeping Lab, Service Lab

reviews.review_heading: I shouldn't have come here. Decent infrastructure, bad hostels, and very average placement.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi capped at 30 Mbps with only 3 devices supported. Labs are good, classrooms are decent, and the library is also good. The hostels are bad. The food goes from decent to incredible frequently throughout the week. We. We only have 3 canteens and 2 restaurants. The canteens only sell a limited amount of stuff. You can't even find soap or toothpaste on campus. The medical facilities are very limited. The ambulance is often used as a taxi for the rich kids. For sports, we have good stuff:...

reviews.review_heading: Best for CSE students with good placement offers.
reviews.review_text: I'm basically a day scholar, but my friends have reviewed it, and it is really good. You can't make fun of the rooms, as most people/students do. The sports facility on the campus is quite good, with regular tournaments held on campus and at the hostel. Gym facilities are also quite good, with a trainer provided.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college but much more expensive.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is accessible to all students on campus in either classrooms or library or hostel with good speed. Labs are well established with most labs having capacities of up to 60 students with high-speed internet and fast computers. Some labs have IMac installed and the rest of the majority are Lenovo. Classrooms are not so good looking but every classroom has AC installed. The library has access to almost every book a person would want from fiction to study-related. Hostels are well established pr...

reviews.review_heading: SRM Ghaziabad offers decent academic knowledge and a supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are excellent. Wi-Fi is not very good, but they provide their best. Labs are very good and provide Lenovo ThinkPad and Apple MacBook Air. The library provides good books for 15 days. Canteen food is very good, and the prices are not expensive.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and decent crowd with good classrooms and labs, but no fest and events.
reviews.review_text: Hostel infrastructure is quite decent, not as luxurious. We have mess hall in hostel. There are various canteens from which students can buy food and also quench their thirst. In my course, there is good Wi-Fi, lab classes, and good Wi-Fi speed. We have good benches in classroom.

reviews.review_heading: Better than many colleges in NCR.
reviews.review_text: The campus offers a fair range of facilities to support both academic and student life. Students have access to Wi-Fi with a speed of 2 Mbps, which is sufficient for basic browsing and study-related work. Classrooms are fully air-conditioned, providing a comfortable learning environment, while the hostels are also equipped with AC, making student accommodation convenient. The mess food quality is average, though it meets basic needs. Apart from academics, the institute organizes decent cultural ...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied faculty is good, and placement facilities are best.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good, labs are the best, and all features are pre installed. Classrooms are well maintained, the library is one of the favorite places in college, and all books are available. Hostels are good, food is good but not the best, a medical facility is available, and all sports are here for physical fitness.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities, nice placements, and a decent crowd.
reviews.review_text: Campus is well maintained, neat and clean, full of greenery. Air conditioning in all classes. Big ground, basketball courts available for all kinds of sports, indoor and outdoor. Hostel is also pretty nice, and the food is tasty and good, with nice infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, good professors, and below average crowd. Overall, it is good.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities here are good. Infrastructure is also good. The price is on a little bit higher side. Mess quality is okay. There are four different canteens in the hostel campus. The food here is good. Wi-Fi connections are provided in hostel. Medical facilities are not there in hostel, it is provided by college. But the doctor is available only during day time.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good. The placement in this college is very high.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very neat and clean. Wi-Fi is very fast. The library is also there where students can sit and study. The hostel is also good. The quality of food in the hostel is also good, it feels very tasty. The canteen is also there. Medical facilities are also good. On our campus, there are many sports and games like basketball courts, tennis courts, cricket grounds, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus with strong placements. Balanced environment for learning and career growth.
reviews.review_text: Life at the campus is enjoyable and productive, with supportive teachers, great infrastructure, and excellent hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: SRM is the best in Ghaziabad.
reviews.review_text: SRM Institute infrastructure is the best in every aspect. There are many facilities available in this college like Wi-Fi for the students and faculty members. There are big labs for the students so they can easily do practicals. The classroom of this college is air-conditioned at all times. The hostel of this college is very big, where students can live together.

reviews.review_heading: In short, I would say if you want to study and pursue your future in studies, join this college.
reviews.review_text: There are all the facilities available, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library; even though there are TVs in VIP hostel rooms. All classes are air-conditioned, and the quality of food is also nice. Our college organises many sports programmes, including sports. There is an ambulance parked on the campus for medical emergencies.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good and well, but local students case inconvenience and problems.
reviews.review_text: Everything is good. But sometimes in rainy season, the grounds get full of water, and sometimes the net services are also not good, as in past experiences, I have suffered. Sometimes insects are found in hostel food. But all over, it is good and well, but I prefer to take a PG or a flat.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SRM Institute of Science and Technology.
reviews.review_text: AI&ML labs have good systems, and classrooms have projectors. There is a tiny bit of cleanliness issue. Library has no air-conditioning but has nice collection if engineering books. Hostel rooms are decent but again not clean. Laundry runs our clothes too. Food in mess is terrible. Gym is always overpacked.

faqs.answer: The hostel fees for BSc students at KIT Kanpur completely depend on the accommodation selected by the candidates. The institute offers host rooms in more than 5 buildings. faqs.answer: Yes, KIT Kanpur is a private institution, it may directly admittes at the institute level under management quota seats. The 15% seats in private institutions shall be filled by the Management/ NRI quota at the specified eligibility criteria. Vacant seats in the MBA course will be filled by the institute within 15 days after the last date of counseling. Priority will be given to actual as well as eligible applicants, their relative merit will be decided on the basis of their rank in CUET PG Exam and UPTAC counselling.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission to MBA at KIT Kanpur?

faqs.answer: Yes, direct admission into Kanpur Institute of Technology is possible. A direct admission takes place for 15% seats through the management/NRI quota, and Diploma holders have the provision of lateral entry into the second year B.Tech as well as Polytechnic.

review_summary.college_name: KIT Kanpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, good infrastructure and a helpful faculty.

content.Placements: 80% students get placed. The highest package offered is 50 LPA, the lowest is 4 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS and Infosys. 90% from Google, Tata Motors, and Information Technology. The college boasts experienced and dedicated faculty, supportive administrative staff, and a strong placement record. Companies like TCS and Infosys recruiting students for various roles. Placement support is generally strong.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has modern labs, smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Hostel rooms are clean and secure, the mess food is hygienic, the canteen offers a variety, and medical support. Sports grounds and indoor games ensure a balanced campus life.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Don't take admission here if you want better college life. If you want a degree, then go for it.

content.Placements: 10% of students are placed. The lowest salary package offered is 1.5 LPA, and the highest salary package offered is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys and TCS. 20% of students got internships from our college. Internships provided by the college are of no use and not that much worthy. Instead of going with college internship, you can find a better one externally.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and library are top-notch, except there's always a network issue in the college. No Wi-Fi is provided. Medical facilities are average. Sports and games facilities are good. Mess and canteen food are below average. No non-veg is allowed inside the college, not even in the mess.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: KIT Kanpur - Affordable engineering with strong CSE placements and supportive campus.

content.Placements: Overall, placement rate is 60-94%, depending on branch and batch. Major companies visit KIT. In CSE\IT, average package is 4 LPA - 6 LPA. It is a decent college, if you work hard. There is a good chance you will get placed. Overall, it is a good college for admission.
content.Infrastructure: Smart classrooms with projectors, AC in most of the rooms, and well-equipped labs with the latest systems and tools. We have large library with books, journals, and provide e-resources. We have high-speed internet access throughout campus, fully functional workshops, and AC seminar halls used for training and events.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I experienced the best at this college.

content.Placements: I am pursuing BCA and around 95% of students from my batch got placed in their dream company with a 2 LPA to 5 LPA package offered. The best companies come for placement like Wipro, Infosys, TCL, etc. They offered the best roles in IT sector and in my course, 100% of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: I am using campus Wi-Fi regularly and I haven't faced any issues yet, and the library is so silent for study and fully air-conditioned. The hostel is good, but I face some issues in the hostel mess. The size of the hostel rooms is so good, and they provide all the equipment for sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good placements, supportive faculty, and decent infrastructure for CSE students.

content.Placements: I am a student of B.Tech in CSE at KIT from the 2024-2028 batch. In our course, around 80-85% of students get placed. The highest package offered is around 12 LPA (off-campus), the average package is 4.5-5 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies include TCS, Wipro, and others. The most common roles offered are Software Developer, QA Tester, and Data Analyst.
content.Infrastructure: The CSE department has a good infrastructure with smart classrooms and well-equipped computer labs. Hostel facilities are decent. The mess food is average, and medical help is available on campus. Sports and indoor games are also provided. It is a very good college for students who belong to middle-class families.

admission_process.title: Kanpur Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Kanpur Institute of Technology admission 2025 offers a range of UG and PG programmes including B.Tech, BFA, BFAD, BBA, M.Tech., MBA, and MCA. The BTech programme, has 6 specialisations, and admits students directly into the second year through lateral entry MTech programmes, available in Civil, Electronics and Communication, and Mechanical Engineering, require a minimum of 60% in BTech/BE with relaxation for reserved categories. Additionally,Kanpur Institute of Technologyoffers full-time Polytechnic programmes in Computer Science, Electrical, Electronics and Communication, Mechanical, and Civil Engineering, both in three-year and second-year (lateral entry) formats.

For Kanpur Institute of Technology admissions to various UG & PG courses, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related toKanpur Institute of Technology courseadmissions 2025:
Kanpur Institute of Technology admission process include registration, selection and fee payment. Below are the steps to get a seat in Kanpur Institute of Technology:
STEP 1: Kanpur Institute of Technology Application Process 2025

Candidates must download the application form from the official website of Kanpur Institute of Technology. Besides, candidates can also apply online. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of to apply for a course. Candidates will also need to submit the specified documents during the application process.
STEP 2: Selection

Kanpur Institute of Technology shortlists candidates for admission based on their merit in the last qualifying exam as well as entrance exams such as, CUET, JEECUP, and JEE Main. The college evaluates the application form of the candidates for their eligibility.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once selected, candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college.
Check out the below video for more information:

faqs.question: Is B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) offered by Kanpur Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Yes, Kanpur Institute of Technology also provides B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) for Diploma students. Candidates need to possess a relevant Diploma in engineering with 45% marks (40% marks for SC/ST candidates). Admission will be given based on JEECUP rank and according to the UPTAC counseling process. The course permits students to join the course directly in the second year and gives industry-oriented training.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech admission at Kanpur Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: For B.Tech in Kanpur Institute of Technology, one should have a minimum of 45% in Class 12 (40% for SC/ST) with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics. Admission is done through JEE Main or CUET scores by UPTAC counseling. Lateral entry is also provided to the candidates holding a Diploma directly into the second year.

faqs.question: What are the specialisations offered in BTech at Kanpur Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Kanpur Institute of Technology provides B.Tech in six branches, such as Computer Science, Information Technology, Mechanical, Civil, Electrical, and Electronics & Communication Engineering. The course focuses on theoretical and practical sessions along with industrial exposure. Placement support is offered in the top IT and engineering firms.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to MBA at KIT Kanpur?
faqs.answer: Yes, KIT Kanpur is a private institution, it may directly admittes at the institute level under management quota seats. placement_report.college_name: KIT Kanpur Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: KIT Kanpur Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The Kanpur Institute of Technology has yet to publish its complete placement report for 2025. As stated on the Official Website, there were a total of 3,000 placements during the 2025 placement season at Kanpur Institute of Technology. The highest salary package awarded to students was INR 25 LPA. More than 200 companies participated in the 2025 placement drive at KIT. Earlier in 2024 the KIT Kanpur placement percentage stood at 87%. The highest package bagged by the students was INR 10 LPA, and the average package stood at INR 2.50 LPA. More than 391 job offers were made. A total of 105 companies participated and selected 552 students.

Kanpur Institute of Technology has a skill development cell that focuses on upgrading skills to international standards through significant industry involvement. The institute also has a Placements and Corporate Relations Cell (PCRC) that engages with industry and constantly strives to expand the industry-academia interface. The cell conducts training sessions, seminars, and many important webinars to update students’ skills in all formats according to global market requirements. KIT Kanpur has also organised various industrial visits to Havells Pvt. Ltd., Baddi, BHEL Ltd., Haridwar, Brooks Laboratories Ltd., Chandigarh, etc.
