The mess, canteen, hostels (for girls and boys), medical facilities, sports, and games. KIT provides the best services in all these areas.

reviews.review_heading: I would rate 4 out of 5 for the college life.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, and the library are provided with AC. Wi-Fi is also available. I am not a hostel student, but according to me, the hostel food is average. Sports events are organised on a regular basis. Students are free to play and practice sports.

reviews.review_heading: Our respected HOD is the one I really look upto.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. There is Wi-Fi available. There are vast labs (multiple labs). Classrooms available can fill up to more than 100 students. There is a library available and every book is there. You will also find clean washrooms. There is also cold water available (drinkable). There is a canteen. There is also a garden. There are 3 parking areas, and playground is also available.

reviews.review_heading: My college is very good, and it is an autonomous college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of my college are too good. There are airy classrooms and many courses are available. The infrastructure of my college is also good. The hostel facility is good and the quality of food in the mess as well as canteen is great. Medical facilities and extracurricular activities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placement in 2021, and really good infrastructure
reviews.review_text: The campus provides Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a fantastic library. The quality of food in the hostel is very good. The library has a very quiet area, and the classrooms are very clean. The hostel provides hygienic food. The hostel rooms are really good and clean.

reviews.review_heading: My college experience review.
reviews.review_text: KIT was one of the best colleges in Kanpur for graduation because, nowadays, it has become an autonomous college and the first private college in Kanpur. Inside the college, there were three buildings named KIHE, KITP, and KIT, which were the main building for B. Tech and MCA courses. The college provided many facilities like a big playground area with indoor sports, a canteen, 24/7 Wi-Fi with good area coverage, and many more. Labs and classrooms were well-furnished with centralized AC. Facilit...

reviews.review_heading: A short review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is like moderate, but you can also say good. Here some lecture theatres LTs are available in which projectors for a better teaching and understanding experience. There are many computer labs in which 700+ computers are available.

reviews.review_heading: A decent college with good teachers and infrastructure. But it lacks transparency in placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent. I am a day scholar, so I do not know about the hostel infrastructure. The library is big, covering two floors. Classrooms are equipped with air conditioners and projectors. Medical facilities are also good, and there are many sports you can choose to play like cricket, football, basketball, volleyball, carrom, chess, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The college hostel and environment are good. Labs, the library, and classrooms are good. But according to the fee structure of the hostel, the mess food is not good. I live in a PG near college. Medical facilities are good. For sports, our college provides cricket, volleyball, basketball, and badminton. There are indoor games also.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Kanpur Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, the food provided by the college is vegetarian. They provide 3 meals a day which is sufficient for me. The hostel room is good but they charge more money for the hostel as compared to other colleges. At last, the infrastructure is good enough to live in a hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and facilities are satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs are big enough and well ventilated to hold 100 students comfortably. The hostel is good. Hygiene is maintained on a regular basis. Medical and sports facilities are satisfactory. The mess is not good. It needs a serious upgrade. The canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are large to accommodate 100 students. There are 2 libraries. Food is average. Cafeteria provides good food. Medical facilities are free of cost. There is a basketball court, football ground, and volleyball ground.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great campus with average connectivity and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are of good quality, with 24-hour running water services. Twin sharing rooms with attached bathrooms are provided to all the students. The infrastructure in the college is good, especially in the labs. The classrooms can be improved as no air-conditioners are present, leading to suffocation and a hot environment inside. Mess is average but it is compulsory in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the hostel quality. They have good facilities and labs with average teaching
reviews.review_text: The hostel quality is above average, with an attached bathroom to a room shared by two students. However, running water is available only 2 hours a day which is a problem. Classrooms are good, equipped with projectors, wide benches, and are well ventilated.

highlights.summary:

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: College is really good and it is one of the oldest colleges in Karnataka.

review_content.Placements: After graduating from the medical college, you can join either a government job which offers you a salary worth 60000 in Karnataka or you can practice at a good hospital which offers nearly one Lac worth or package. You can earn more on your own if you have a clinic setup, it all depends on your intellect.
review_content.Infrastructure: College has a great campus. It has a 10 floors academic building with new labs having all the required equipments. The campus has free Wi-Fi access. The library is one of the greatest assets of this college. It is located on 2 floors which gives you all the access to a large number of journals and new edition reference books. Hostel facilities are great and really good. The food is adjustable to the students from all parts of the country, every one gets to participate in sports and events.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Really good hospital exposure gives better work experience!

review_content.Placements: A total of 250 students are placed in the college! The highest package might differ depending on which course you are taking, like dermatologist and cardiologist, and surgery has a great scope in MBBS. The lowest package would be at least two lacs, to my knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college library has always been Asia's largest! Classrooms are well furnished. ACs have been installed in the labs and classrooms. Hostel mess has been a privilege for us; they serve hygienic and delicious food. Daily non-vegetarian food is being provided.

review_summary.college_name: JJM Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Highly satisfied with my college because of the great faculty and good infrastructure facilities.

content.Placements: We were a batch of 245 students. All of our batchmates got into internships in the first year. There was great exposure in terms of cadaver dissection, and there was early clinical exposure from the 2nd year. Patient input and professors were great. The overall atmosphere was very good.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was very good in terms of laboratories, classrooms, and especially the library. This college had the largest medical library in all of South Asia. There were many hostels to choose from, including AC and non-AC, and buses were provided with nominal fees.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A very peaceful college and I recommend this college for my future NEET aspirants.

content.Placements: In fact, in MBBS we don't have a system of company placements. Our college has great patient input during internships, so we get to learn a lot. We have been connected to around three hospitals where we get to work during our internship—two being government hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: Despite being an old college that was established around 1965, the infrastructure has been replenished and is still on the mark. Yes, we do have Asia's largest library, where we have so many books, very good infrastructure, and is well maintained.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College is really good and it is one of the oldest colleges in Karnataka.

content.Placements: After graduating from the medical college, you can join either a government job which offers you a salary worth 60000 in Karnataka or you can practice at a good hospital which offers nearly one Lac worth or package. You can earn more on your own if you have a clinic setup, it all depends on your intellect.
content.Infrastructure: College has a great campus. It has a 10 floors academic building with new labs having all the required equipments. The campus has free Wi-Fi access. The library is one of the greatest assets of this college. It is located on 2 floors which gives you all the access to a large number of journals and new edition reference books. Hostel facilities are great and really good. The food is adjustable to the students from all parts of the country, every one gets to participate in sports and events.

individual_reviews.title: Really good hospital exposure gives better work experience!

content.Placements: A total of 250 students are placed in the college! The highest package might differ depending on which course you are taking, like dermatologist and cardiologist, and surgery has a great scope in MBBS. The lowest package would be at least two lacs, to my knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: Our college library has always been Asia's largest! Classrooms are well furnished. ACs have been installed in the labs and classrooms. Hostel mess has been a privilege for us; they serve hygienic and delicious food. Daily non-vegetarian food is being provided.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It's a great college to pursue your dream.

content.Placements: This is the only college where you can get an opportunity to work in two government hospitals and its own hospital.
content.Infrastructure: Since the college was established in 1965, everything looks like an old design, but they have maintained it well. They are constructing new buildings and hospital wards. You will get air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned rooms.
content.Faculty: The college has many staff members in each department, starting from the first year to the final year. Since the college has a super specialty hospital, you will get experts in all departments. Their knowledge and skills are unmatchable. Many teachers are from AIIMS Delhi and PGI.

During the JJM Medical College Devangere Karnataka NEET UG cutoff 2025, the closing rank for MBBS admission is 45544 for the General Home State Quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same stood at 128014.

In this section, JJM Medical College Devangere Karnataka NEET UG cutoff 2025 is available, alongside the last round cutoff of 2024 and 2023 for the general category students. Admission to the MBBS courses is done based on the NEET UG exam ranks, followed by the Karnataka NEET UG counselling process to avail a seat at JJM Medical College. reviews.review_heading: This is very old college and best for MBBS and PG.
reviews.review_text: Everything is here library is big and classroom also. Wi-Fi is not available here. In hostel there is single room double room and triple rooms are available some hostel are costly but they are giving all facilities but some are very reasonable. And sports, games, canteen everything is nice here.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best RGUHS colleges to pursue MBBS.
reviews.review_text: There are two different types of hostels, and one hostel has all the facilities but is costly. Another hostel is a typical hostel with a common bathroom and limited facilities. The second hostel is very affordable. In the costlier hostel, you get Wi-Fi, a washing machine, an attached bathroom, both single and double sharing rooms. There is a common mess for both hostels. The food served here is good.

There is facility of hostel for boys &girls separately. The hospital is having separate wards of all specialties with all modern infra-structure. The truma-centre & Cath lab will be functional very soon. The Faculty is well qualified &experienced. J.N. medical college, AMU Aligarh was established in 1962. reviews.review_heading: Complete JJMMC feedback for newcomers.
reviews.review_text: It has one of Asia's largest libraries, which is the best advantage for those who cannot afford costly books. Wi-Fi is usually not provided by the college, that is one drawback to accept. Coming to the hostel, we have both AC and non-AC options, which is our choice. The mess food is really very nice compared to most of the hostels.

reviews.review_heading: I am super satisfied with the college campus, hostel, and friends.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is superb, and even the mess is clean and tidy. Food specifically is southern spicy food. Everything is perfect for people from the south, you will find alot of supportive friends and faculty members. The perfect timetable, the place around the hostel, and the maintenance of hostel rooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: Jjm College has good teachers along with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Every classroom is equipped with 6-10 speakers and a projector. College Wi-Fi is free but a little weak. Labs are well-ventilated. The library has a huge number of books with various versions of the same book. There are many hostels for both boys and girls, and there are also many messes nearby the college that are affordable.

reviews.review_heading: Really good clinical learning and exposure.
reviews.review_text: There is no campus as such, though there is a huge premises for the college, auditorium, amphitheatre, and hospital and OPD, but the hostels are all a short distance away from the college, the international boys and the international girls hostel are fairly decent and have all the basic amenities and additional A. C and water heaters, but they feel expensive, the old general hostels are less hygienic and more crowded. Only the general hostels have an attached mess for food, but the international...

reviews.review_heading: Slightly dissatisfied because of infrastructure and wide sullabus.
reviews.review_text:
Tech labs is there to access lab skills
Class room are old and new and very nice sitting
the biggest library in india. Very relevant books are available
Wi-Fi facility in library
Dissection hall is there for human preserved body to dissect
Auditorium is there which is huge.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for students who want placements.
reviews.review_text: All facilities were good. The food served in the hostel was good and clean. The hostel was good. Our college had Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms for study hours. It had a huge library with 2,000 books. Our college had a canteen. Medical facilities were good in the hostel.

faqs.answer: Osmania University gives admission to its courses on the basis of Merit- and entrance-based tests. For admission to postgraduate, postgraduate diploma, and five-year integrated courses, Osmania University administers the Common Postgraduate Entrance Test (CPGET). In addition, Osmania University also accepts results from a number of national entrance exams, including the GATE, TSICET, CMAT, Andhra Pradesh ECET, and TS EAMCET, for undergraduate studies like BTech and other PG, PG Diploma, and Certificate programmes. Osmania University administers a PhD entrance exam for admission. Admission to Osmania University courses, including BA, BSc, and BBA, is also based on merit. Candidates who meet the eligibility requirements for any course at Osmania University may submit an online application through the website. The university releases a list with the shorlited students on its official website who can participate in the next round of admissions. For a few courses, the university also conducts a counseling session.

faqs.answer: After qualifying for the exam one has to check the cutoff for a particular college and a particular course. After checking for the particular course one has to apply for counseling and after counseling one can pay the fees. For, clearing the exam the cutoff was 25 percent and to become eligible score the candidate must score a minimum of 50 marks for the general category. The SC/ST candidates are eligible at 20 marks out of 200 and they can apply for counseling after that and they can also secure their seats by paying the fees. The minimum score for OBC Category was 25.

overview_faqs.question: Is Osmania University College for Women accredited?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, OUCW is accredited 'Five Stars' in the first cycle and 'A' Grade in the next two cycles of NAAC. It's a reputed college in Hyderabad. And the first ever Women University. It's renamed as Telangana Mahila Vishwavidyalayam. It provides quality education to the students.

overview_faqs.question: What is Osmania University College for Women famous for?
overview_faqs.answer: Osmania University college for Women was the British Residency for James Achilles Kirkpatrick from 1798 to 1805. It is sometimes referred to as Hyderabad Residency or Koti Residency. Durbar Hall, a historic structure constructed by the British, is also a part of it. This college has been upgraded to become Telangana State's First Women University and changed its name to "Telangana Mahila Vishwavidyalayam" in the year 2022. This college was founded in 1924, and in the following year, 2024, it will celebrate its 100th anniversary. Due to its rich history, this campus is also a popular tourist destination. This tourist attraction draws lots of foreign visitors.

review_summary.college_name: Osmania University College for Women Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Economics - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall best college for M.A. In the Economics Course.

content.Placements: Placements at our college are excellent. Most of the top multinational corporations come here every year to recruit a large number of pupils. Our branch has the highest number of referrals. The highest and the lowest salaries offered were 30 LPA and 9 LPA, respectively. The average salary is 19 LPA. Approximately 77% of students get placed.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides excellent facilities in all areas. Mess cuisine is much better when proper cleanliness is maintained. The hotel is pretty cheap, yet it is enough in terms of security. The college has its own university clinic that is available 24/7. Overall, this is the best college.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It's an awesome college for the M.Sc. in Computer Science course.

content.Placements: About 60-80 percent of students get placed in my classes, which is excellent for all students. As far as I know, the highest offer is around 20 LPA–25 LPA, while the average offer is around 7 LPA–12 LPA. Deloitte, EY, and PwC are some of the top hiring firms. The top roles include network architect and database administrator. The college also provides internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our hostel is equipped with Wi-Fi, drinking water, lights, fans, and beds. Our college had fully air-conditioned classrooms. There is a special library on our campus, and books are available for students. The food in the mess is average. There are three restaurants on our campus, and the fast food was good. We have a small area where we could play various sports like volleyball, soccer, and cricket.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Sep 25) B.Sc. in Biological Science - Batch of 2026

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very bad. There are no fans and lights in some classrooms. The main thing benches are also not there. Students sit on the floor sometimes as the number of students is more. Library is good and all books are available for your particular subject and topics. In hostels, the only good thing is food. It is very delicious and good quality. But the infrastructure in the room is very bad. Around 15 members are there and only one fan is there in the room.

admission_overview.college_name: Osmania University College for Women Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: Telangana Mahila Viswavidyalayam admissions are offered to UG & PG courses in the stream of Management, Humanities, Science, Commerce and Computer Applications. Admission to all the PG courses is entrance-based.Telangana Mahila Viswavidyalayamaccepts scores of state-level entrance exams such as TSI CET and TS CPGET. Further, Telangana Mahila Viswavidyalayam admission to UG aspirants is done merit-based, followed by DOTE counselling. Read the following article to know more about Telangana Mahila Viswavidyalayam course admission 2025.

Telangana Mahila Viswavidyalayam course admission is both merit and entrance-based for respective courses. Candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria as per the course requirements. Check below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria for Telangana Mahila Viswavidyalayam admission 2025:
The admission criteria for otherUG & PG courses are here

Telangana Mahila Viswavidyalayam admission process is based on both merit and entrance-based scores. Check the following steps for a detailed process around Telangana Mahila Viswavidyalayam admission 2025:
STEP 1: Application Process

To apply for admission to PG courses at Telangana Mahila Viswavidyalayam, students must apply on the respective websites of the TSI CET and TS CPGET entrance exams for respective courses. For admission to UG courses, students must apply on DOTE Counselling website.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Telangana Mahila Viswavidyalayam admissions are both merit and entrance-based. For MBA & MCA courses, students are admitted based on TSI CET scores. Whereas for other PG courses, candidates must qualify for TS CPGET. The selection for UG courses is merit-based, such candidates must register for DOTE counselling.

faqs.answer: To get admission to Osmania University first a candidate should take an entrance exam of the college TS EAMCET. The result of the exam TS EAMCET score decides the admission criteria. After, clearing the exam check for the merit list on the official website, and after that the candidate should apply for counseling and pay the fees for counseling. Then he/she will be given a time slot for the verification of documents. After a successful verification, he/she will be allowed to choose the respective Programe or course. After, that students can fill out the form and can pay the fees to secure their admission.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to Osmania University College for Women?
faqs.answer: No, you can't get direct admission in OUCW. If you are trying for under graduation you have to apply through DOST (Degree online services Telangana). There will be phases in it. There are no management seats in this college only through DOST you can get admission. If you are trying for PG then TSICET has to be written. It is an entrance test for the PG colleges. There will be 4 phases in DOST. You have to apply for it select the course and wait for the seat allotment. Seat allotment depends upon the marks and caste. After the allotment of seats there will be counselling for the students. In that, they take all the documents and the fees of the students and after the admission if any student wants to change the course they can do it through intraphase which will be after joining in the college. And the hostel facility is only available for the students of under graduation of 2nd and final years. The hostel admission is done on the basis of the distance of the student's home town and the

faqs.question: Which is the top courses of Osmania University College for Women?
faqs.answer: Top courses offered by Osmania University are as follows:Bachelor Of Technology (B Tech.)It is Four year undergraduate courses mainly focuses on engineering disciplines such as Civil Engineering, Meechanical Engineering  and Electronics Engineering and communication Engineering.Bachelor of Pharmacy:BPharma is a 4 year undergraduate course that focuses on Pharmaceutical sciemces and drug development. It does not have any specific specialisation in this undeergraduate program.Bachelor of Commerce:It is a three year undegraduate programs. It mainly focuses on accountancy, auditing, business studies and entrepreneurships computer applications and taxation. Those who wants to take admission must have completed 12th boards with good marks.

faqs.question: How many students can do MCA at Osmania University College for Women?
faqs.answer: Osmania University offers seat to only60 students. MCA is a 2 years course at PG level. To get admitted at Omania university to pursue Masters in computer application, applicants must meet criteria of 50% in graduation. If you are a general and BC candidate you also have to qualify TSICET and other entrance examinations.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Osmania University College for Women?
faqs.answer: Campus recruitment is a testimonial that Osmania universiity has strong comnnection with the top recruiters and is dedicated to providing great placement opportunities to students. Osmania university has been constantly providing great placement opportunities to its student every year. The university has not revealed the placement data for all courses however, for the academic year 2022, a total 50 MBA students were placed at the top companies which include Accenture, HDFC Bank, Orient cement and many more. One student was fortunate enough to get the highest package of INR 18.2 Lacs per annum. The median salary for 3 years UG programme for the year 2022 was INR 425000.

faqs.question: How are B.Sc placements at Osmania University College for Women?
faqs.answer: The Osmania University College for Women has a good placement record for B.Sc students. The College provides in-campus placement as well and also provides ample internship opportunities for the students. The Placement rate of the college lies between 80-82%. The highest Placement was of 4.5 LPA and the average Placement was of 2.5 LPA. The companies visiting the college for Placements are Infosys, Tata Consultancy Services, Mahindra, and Accenture. Companies such as Path Labs, and Dr. reddy's also provide Placement to B.Sc students at a high Placement rate. The students are also selected from college to go for Industrial visit at Yakult Company etc.

faqs.question: What is the fees for UG/PG courses at Osmania University College for Women?
faqs.answer: OUCW, Hyderabad stands as a prestigious institution dedicated to providing quality education through contemporary teaching approaches The fees structure varies upon the course to course. Below are the fee structures for the primary courses. Fees of B.Sc. and B.Com are INR 49,350 and INR 42,700 respectively, for the duration of 3 years. On the other hand, to get admission in M.A., M.Com, and M.Sc one should pay the fees of INR 4,520?45,460, and INR 71,120 respectively.

faqs.question: What is the fee for PG courses at Osmania University College for Women?
faqs.answer: Osmania College is a very reputed university in Hyderabad, usually, its PG Courses fees range between 14000 - 33000 Indian rupees per year as per the newest circular present on its official website. If you want to do regular PG, then it will cost you around INR 14000 to INR 20490 every year. And, if you want to pursue self-finance affiliated PG courses, Osmania University charges between INR 23100 and INR 33000. Self-finance OU courses range from INR 21000 to INR 35000. For detailed information, you can visit the college's official website. this college also charges special fees for services like library, Fest, internet, games and sports, lab, handbook, magazines, Placement Cell, and IUT, but this fee is included in the cost that I have written above.

hostel.description: Osmania University College for Women provides hostel accommodation for 250 students. Second year and final year UG students are only eligible for hostel accommodation. Room allotment is based on distance, family background and economic conditions. Andhra Pradesh reservation rules are also taken into consideration for room allotment.

library.description: Osmania University College for Women library is among the oldest libraries in the city and it caters to the academic requirements of the staff and students.The holdings of the library are frequently updated. The library is equipped with latest software. INFLIBNET facilities are also available to enable online access of resources.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Physics Lab, Biotechnology Lab

reviews.review_heading: Overall best college for M.A. In the Economics Course.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent facilities in all areas. Mess cuisine is much better when proper cleanliness is maintained. The hotel is pretty cheap, yet it is enough in terms of security. The college has its own university clinic that is available 24/7. Overall, this is the best college.

reviews.review_heading: It's an awesome college for the M.Sc. in Computer Science course.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel is equipped with Wi-Fi, drinking water, lights, fans, and beds. Our college had fully air-conditioned classrooms. There is a special library on our campus, and books are available for students. The food in the mess is average. There are three restaurants on our campus, and the fast food was good. We have a small area where we could play various sports like volleyball, soccer, and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: Totally dissatisfied with my course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very bad. There are no fans and lights in some classrooms. The main thing benches are also not there. Students sit on the floor sometimes as the number of students is more. Library is good and all books are available for your particular subject and topics. In hostels, the only good thing is food. It is very delicious and good quality. But the infrastructure in the room is very bad. Around 15 members are there and only one fan is there in the room.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: It is a spacious and serene campus. The university has a large campus with well-maintained buildings and facilities. Department-specific blocks, each department has its own block with dedicated labs and classrooms. Adequate facilities, the university provides good infrastructure, including well-equipped labs, classrooms, and library.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure with adequate facilities. It provides good infrastructure, including well-equipped labs, classrooms, and library. Campus is spacious and serene. Our college has a large campus with well-maintained building and facilities. We have different blocks for each department.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure which is located in beautiful nature. We have a spacious and serene campus with a large campus with well-maintained buildings (blocks) and facilities. Each department has its own block with dedicated labs and classrooms. Adequate facilities are provided with good infrastructure, including well-equipped labs, classrooms, and libraries.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the campus and its culture.
reviews.review_text: Our college is located in a good environment. It has good infrastructure with nature. We have different departments with different courses. We have pleasant classrooms and a library to study in. We have labs with systems that fulfil the student requirements. We have a canteen, labs, a ground, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good college by providing good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure which is located with good environment. In our college, they different branches with specific courses. Our college is improving the hostel facility and medical facilities. In our college, we have auditorium, sports, canteen, classrooms, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with good encouragement.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure enhancement underway, including the construction of modern academic blocks, auditorium, and sports facilities. The students have a lack of facilities including issues with hostels and sewerage. Our college has different types of courses.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: Modern labs with advanced equipment and spacious classrooms with LCD projectors. High-speed Wi-Fi and a well-stocked library with digital resources. Comfortable hostels with essential amenities. Nutritious food options are available in the mess and canteen. A basic healthcare unit is available. Facilities are available for sports like cricket, basketball, and indoor games. The infrastructure supports both academic and personal growth, providing a conducive environment for students.

reviews.review_heading: M.A. in Political Science.
reviews.review_text: Security cameras are installed in every classroom and everywhere around the campus. At the security gate, visitors are allowed inside only after the security check. Also, students are not allowed to step outside the campus before the bell.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best infrastructures.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our college are good. Our college has Wi-Fi, laboratories, well-maintained classrooms, and a library. The hostel fee does not include a mess facility, so we have to pay separately for food. There are many messes and cafeterias that offer very good food at reasonable prices.

reviews.review_heading: Title of review: This was one of the best colleges for getting a bright future for their lives.
reviews.review_text: Telangana Mahila Vishwavidyalayam college has perfect faculty members and infrastructure available for our courses. There are many departments, labs, classrooms, and a library for studying. There is also ground for playing sports and games, medical facilities, a canteen, etc. And one more happy thing is that the students are not silent and dare to do all, either protest against the government or that the college is for women.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The College Library is among the oldest libraries in the city, and it caters to the academic requirements of the staff and students. The holdings of the library are frequently updated. The Library is equipped with the latest software & hardware, and INFLIBNET facilities are also available to enable online access to resources. Hostel facilities are good; the food they provide is very tasty and of sufficient quantity, and they provide non-veg twice a week. The registration process is online, and w...

reviews.review_heading: Good degree women’s college.
reviews.review_text: The classes have good infrastructure, and the labs are well-equipped with chemical computers. Each department has Wi-Fi access. The hostel facilities are very good, with a homely and eco-friendly environment. There is a health center available, and the canteen offers a variety of food.

data.description: The faculty at OUCW is very good. They are highly educated. Most of them are PhD graduates and LLB. They have more teaching experience and their way of teaching is very good. They focus on each and every student and help them understand the concept. They clarify the students doubts even after the completion of the class.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Terna Medical College:

faqs.answer: A:    Terna Medical College offers Degree courses including 1 UG and 1 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Terna Medical College has specializations such as MD specializations in Community Medicine.
faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Terna Medical College?

reviews_list.review_title: Best among private colleges.

review_content.Placements: Placement in college for MBBS students is 100% because any student who completed the final year and internship can join any Primary health centre as a Medical officer. Salary range starting for government- 70 to 80k depending upon location and facilities. Intern students can also join private hospitals located in Vashi for practice as well as for extra income.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good not the best. Wi-Fi is available at a decent speed. The library is the best with a seperate discussion room. The classrooms are okay but not spacious enough. The canteen on the ground floor is good for tea and breakfast (mess facilities are not avalible).

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college, average infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: I am currently in the 1st year of MBBS. It is a good college considering its location in Mumbai. It is also affiliated to Maharashtra University of Health Sciences and also to Navi Mumbai Municipal Corporation Hospital which gives a chance of internships in government and private both hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure for our course are enough. There is a library, study room, computer labs, dissection halls and separate rooms for physiology and biochemistry practicals and also for theory classes. The only drawback is that the hostel is far from college, which is 1.2 km. The hostel is good with all facilities required, and 3 students can accommodate in a room.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: A really good medical college with the best faculty members.

review_content.Placements: A total of 100 to 150 students are placed in this course. The highest package offered is 7 LPA. Many hospitals are recruiting. Around 85% of students get internships, and almost all students are now working with hospitals. A general doctor is the top role.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities provided by the college are the best. They have well-ventilated classrooms, well-equipped AC rooms, and a good amount of benches available for students. The library is good, where all students can sit and study. The library is also AC, and one the canteen is good.

overview_faqs.question: Is Terna Medical College a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Terna Medical College is a well-known institution for MBBS, MD courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Terna Medical College has a rating of 4.2 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4 on campuslife, 4.3 on placements, 4.7 on faculty and 3.7 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Terna Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a good medical college in Navi Mumbai.

content.Placements: There is a batch of 100 students doing MBBS since this is a medical course. There is an entrance exam after the course is completed. Around 70-80% of students settle as MBBS doctors, remaining striving hard to get good marks in NEET PG and do a postgraduate course in a particular specialty field.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, classrooms are spacious, clean, and well ventilated. Proper hygiene is maintained. There is a computer laboratory, library with central air-conditioner, games room, and a good auditorium. The hostel is around 1 km away from the main college building. The college also has a large turf ground for cricket and football.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Best among private colleges.

content.Placements: Placement in college for MBBS students is 100% because any student who completed the final year and internship can join any Primary health centre as a Medical officer. Salary range starting for government- 70 to 80k depending upon location and facilities. Intern students can also join private hospitals located in Vashi for practice as well as for extra income.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good not the best. Wi-Fi is available at a decent speed. The library is the best with a seperate discussion room. The classrooms are okay but not spacious enough. The canteen on the ground floor is good for tea and breakfast (mess facilities are not avalible).

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college, average infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: I am currently in the 1st year of MBBS. It is a good college considering its location in Mumbai. It is also affiliated to Maharashtra University of Health Sciences and also to Navi Mumbai Municipal Corporation Hospital which gives a chance of internships in government and private both hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure for our course are enough. There is a library, study room, computer labs, dissection halls and separate rooms for physiology and biochemistry practicals and also for theory classes. The only drawback is that the hostel is far from college, which is 1.2 km. The hostel is good with all facilities required, and 3 students can accommodate in a room.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A really good medical college with the best faculty members.

content.Placements: A total of 100 to 150 students are placed in this course. The highest package offered is 7 LPA. Many hospitals are recruiting. Around 85% of students get internships, and almost all students are now working with hospitals. A general doctor is the top role.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities provided by the college are the best. They have well-ventilated classrooms, well-equipped AC rooms, and a good amount of benches available for students. The library is good, where all students can sit and study. The library is also AC, and one the canteen is good.

reviews_list.review_title: Well-structured journalism course with strong practical training and decent campus facilities.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% of students got placed from our journalism course. The highest package offered is 5.5 LPA, the lowest is 1.8 LPA, and the average package stood at 3 LPA. Top recruiters include NDTV, Dainik Bhaskar, The Indian Express, and Zee Media. Nearly 60% of students secured internships in companies like India Today, The Quint, and News18. The top roles offered are reporter, content writers, copy editor, social media executive, and digital journalism.
review_content.Infrastructure: The journalism department offers well-equipped classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, a media lab, and a resourceful library. Hostels are clean with basic amenities. The mess serves hygienic food, and the canteen offers affordable snacks. Medical facilities are available on campus, and students have access to sports grounds and indoor games for recreation.

review_content.Placements: The placement opportunities were not much, but about 65% of students got placed. The highest salary package was 12 LPA for government jobs. The B.A. is mainly an undergraduate course which do not apply for the placements in the company, it is the pathway for people to do things in the future.
review_content.Infrastructure: There were all kinds of facilities available, like nice rooms, labs, classrooms, and a library. The mess and canteen facilities were very nice, but there was no medical facility available. Some sports facilities were nice, like cricket. The college was very good at different kinds of games.

Generally, candidates need to have strong marks in their previous qualifying exams to secure a place in these programs. review_summary.college_name: DAV Chandigarh Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good campus and college life, but placement rates are not that good.

content.Placements: Placements are average, totally depending on students' skills. There are 422 students in the B.Com 1st year. HCL, Wipro, and Infosys are some top companies. Mostly, the students with skills and their communication skills got a good placement in top-notch companies. The top roles of my course B.Com are accountant and manager.
content.Infrastructure: The average infrastructure is not too good. Some classrooms are so good, but some classes are the worst. The benches in some classes are good, but in some classes they're not. The canteen is good with decent food prices. The sports ground is too big, and there is a cricket ground in the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Enjoyable B.Com journey with good academics, but infrastructure needs improvement.

content.Placements: I completed my B.Com Degree in 2025 from DAV College, Chandigarh. Being a part of the 2022-2025 batch, I would say that my overall academic and professional experience is quite good. In our course, around 65-70% of the students are placed through campus placements. The highest package offered is around 8LPA, and the average is around 4-5LPA. Some of the top companies that recruited are ICICI Bank, Wipro, KPMG, Infosys, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities of the Commerce department were quite average due to frequent electricity fluctuations. The Wi-Fi facility is also quite decent as it did not provide adequate speed. The library is well-maintained with air conditioning, and borrowing is also a very easy process.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Journalism - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Well-structured journalism course with strong practical training and decent campus facilities.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students got placed from our journalism course. The highest package offered is 5.5 LPA, the lowest is 1.8 LPA, and the average package stood at 3 LPA. Top recruiters include NDTV, Dainik Bhaskar, The Indian Express, and Zee Media. Nearly 60% of students secured internships in companies like India Today, The Quint, and News18. The top roles offered are reporter, content writers, copy editor, social media executive, and digital journalism.
content.Infrastructure: The journalism department offers well-equipped classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, a media lab, and a resourceful library. Hostels are clean with basic amenities. The mess serves hygienic food, and the canteen offers affordable snacks. Medical facilities are available on campus, and students have access to sports grounds and indoor games for recreation.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: College is the best in Chandigarh.

content.Placements: 30% of students got placements. The highest package was 10 LPA. 40% of students got internships but mostly students did not get any opportunity for jobs which may be their fault on campus. Overall, the college is the best and I will recommend it to everyone.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of college was best. But one thing there was no proper drinking water. The classrooms were neat and clean but there were no ACs in the classrooms. Even in the college canteen which was very disappointing. There must be ACs in classroom and canteen.

faqs.question: What is the CUET cutoff for DAV College Chandigarh 2023?
faqs.answer: The DAV College Chandigarh uses a number of criteria to determine its cutoff scores. Students must take the PUCET PG entrance test in order to be admitted to the M.Sc. programme. Candidates get admitted to DAV College Chandigarh only after passing the cutoff. The PUCET PG entrance exam carries 120 total points, with the following cutoff scores for various categories:In general: 15% of the total, 18 SC, 10 % of the total, 12 ST, 10 % of the total, 12 PwD, 10 % of the total, 121 cutoff marks.The f

faqs.question: Can I get admission in DAV Chandigarh without CUET?

faqs.answer: DAV Chandigarh is located in the beautiful city of Chandigarh in the Sector 10 locality. faqs.answer: The last date for 2024 admission at DAV College Chandigarh has not been released yet. To be eligible for the UG and PG courses at the DAV College, the candidates must have completed class 12 and graduation respectively with a minimum of 50 % from any recognized institute.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for the BBA programme at DAV College Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: The exact application fee for the BBA programme at DAV College Chandigarh isn't available online. Here's what you can do:College Website: Look for "BBA Admissions" or "Fee Structure" on the college website. They might have a downloadable brochure with programme fees.Contact Admissions: Call or email the college's admissions office directly. This is the most reliable way to get the exact application fee.While unconfirmed, application fees for similar programs in India typically range from 500 to 1000.

faqs.question: Can I take admission in DAV College Chandigarh, without CUET in BBA?
faqs.answer: As of today, March 21,  2024, it's unlikely that DAV College Chandigarh requires CUET (Central Universities Entrance Test) for admission to the BBA program. Here's why:CUET Focus: CUET is currently mandated for admissions to undergraduate programs in central universities only. DAV College Chandigarh is likely a state-affiliated college, so it wouldn't necessarily follow CUET guidelines.Traditional Admission Process: State-affiliated colleges like DAV College Chandigarh typically have their own admission processes, often based on merit in your 10+2 qualifying exam scores.

faqs.question: Is a CAT score of 85 percentile good for admission to MBA at DAV College Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: The aspirants who score CAT percentile in a range of 80-90 must not worry as there are many colleges accepting CAT score 80-90 percentile. It is also a good CAT score, and most MBA colleges do not pre-announce the cutoff. If you score 80 percentile in the CAT exam, you can expect good B-schools for admission.If you are aiming for the top 6 IIMs, then you must score 99 percentile for even getting shortlisted for the Written Ability Test (WAT) and Personal Interview (PI). However, for other top MBA colleges 90-95 percentile is good. A majority of CAT test takers fall in the category of 80-90 percentile.

hostel_campus.college_name: DAV Chandigarh Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Good campus and college life, but placement rates are not that good.
reviews.review_text: The average infrastructure is not too good. Some classrooms are so good, but some classes are the worst. The benches in some classes are good, but in some classes they're not. The canteen is good with decent food prices. The sports ground is too big, and there is a cricket ground in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Enjoyable B.Com journey with good academics, but infrastructure needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of the Commerce department were quite average due to frequent electricity fluctuations. The Wi-Fi facility is also quite decent as it did not provide adequate speed. The library is well-maintained with air conditioning, and borrowing is also a very easy process.

reviews.review_heading: Well-structured journalism course with strong practical training and decent campus facilities.
reviews.review_text: The journalism department offers well-equipped classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, a media lab, and a resourceful library. Hostels are clean with basic amenities. The mess serves hygienic food, and the canteen offers affordable snacks. Medical facilities are available on campus, and students have access to sports grounds and indoor games for recreation.

reviews.review_heading: DAV is a nice college with different types of people around and nice facilities.
reviews.review_text: There were all kinds of facilities available, like nice rooms, labs, classrooms, and a library. The mess and canteen facilities were very nice, but there was no medical facility available. Some sports facilities were nice, like cricket. There were good-quality books found in the library, and different librarians interacted with each other. The infrastructure of the college was very nice. Different college students love to come to Dav College, and the quality of food in the mess and canteen was n...

reviews.review_heading: College is the best in Chandigarh.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college was best. But one thing there was no proper drinking water. The classrooms were neat and clean but there were no ACs in the classrooms. Even in the college canteen which was very disappointing. There must be ACs in classroom and canteen.

reviews.review_heading: It has a vibrant campus life with great faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is outstanding with well-working Wi-Fi, AC classrooms, computer labs, a library, a reading hall, 6 canteens, laundry service, and a medical room. Sports department offers numerous opportunities. There are hostels for both boys and girls with good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and nice facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are too good in our college, nice classrooms with comfortable chair. Wi-Fi facilities on the campus are for teachers. Labs and library are very helpful, we spent most time in the library. Canteen food is good. Especially, samosas are very good. College is very near to bus stand. Bus availability is good.

reviews.review_heading: It’s a good college with a nice environment, making it easy to make new friends and enjoy good food.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is too good, according to the fee. Labs are also available according to their courses. Wi-Fi is available for all the students everyone can use it. The hostel is also excellent, in one room, two students staying in AC rooms are too expensive in comparison to non-AC rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Dav College - My experience.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi, air-conditioned as well as lit rooms. It is a good department for anyone who is not comfortable going to a government college. Anyhow the food in the canteen is checked by professionals and then given to the students. There are medical facilities as well as sports facilities and a sports day is also celebrated every year.

reviews.review_heading: Campus life and academics at DAV.
reviews.review_text: There is a three floor library and the classrooms are tidy and airy. We have internet access on campus. There are also projectors. The library also has computer corners, with around 20 computers. There are separate on-campus hostels, and the rooms are well-furnished. Each room also has a balcony, and there is a beauty parlor in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good and supportive teachers.
reviews.review_text: The college has a hostel, food, canteen, and labs are available in the college. The benches are not in a good condition. Nails are there on the benches and the benches are clean normal safe. The quality of the food is good. Yograj Cricket Academy is there in the college. There are many alumni of this college in sports such as Neeraj Chopra, Kapil Dev, Yuvraj Singh, Manu Bhakhar and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Overall good but could be more better.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available for students in the college campus, but it is not available everywhere in the college. Labs are constructed, but I never visited as I'm from a different department. Windows are broken in most of the classes and nails and screws of benches tears our jeans. The library is good, different books are available, and there's a reading hall as well as air-conditioners are available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: This college is nice and I prefer this college to take admission.
reviews.review_text:
In my college, there are different buildings of hostels for boys and girls. There is also a different mess for both boys and girls. In hostel Wi-Fi facility provided by college requested by student council of college, which includes: 
President Lavish Sherawat 
Vice president Mrinal Steta
General Secretary Sourav Panwar
Joint Secretary Yaima Oiman.

reviews.review_heading: DAV College- A detailed review.
reviews.review_text: We have labs for each and everything, like psychology labs, bio labs, zoology labs, etc. We also have smart classrooms. Wi-Fi facility is provided to each and every student. The food served in the hostel is also very good. There are different sports like cricket, basketball, hockey, etc.

reviews.review_heading: DAV College, the life of youngsters.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure to be honest is pretty basic and quite old, but the canteen food is fabulous. Hostel life is pretty interesting and affordable too. College offers many places for students to chill out inside the campus. The overall environment is pretty chill.

highlights.summary: Admissions for the session 2026-2027 are about to open soon at Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus.

college_info.intro:
Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus offers UG, PG, Diploma & Doctoral programmes. The programmes are offered in fields like Engineering, Management, Pharmacy, Humanities, etc. B.E. & MBA are the flagship courses of the university. B.E. is offered at the UG level for the duration of 4 years. B.E. programme is given in streams like Civil Engineering, Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering & Computer Science and Engineering. After completing the programme students can work in both government & private sectors. BTech students can work as Software Engineers, Data Scientists, or can take up various fields relevant to their stream.
MBA is offered for 2 years at the PG level. For the MBA programme, students need to have any Bachelor degree with at least 50% marks in aggregate or an equivalent grade for General / OBC candidates, and 45% marks in aggregate or an equivalent grade for SC/ST and Differently Abled (DA) category candidates from a recognized University / Institute. MBA is offered in more than 15 specialisations like Advertising and Public Relations, Business Economics, Finance, Human Resource, Marketing Management, Tourism Administration, etc. Below are the details of the popular programmes offered at Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus:

Candidates need to write the CUET entrance exam which is conducted by the NTA. After clearing the CUET entrance exam, students may get a provisional allotment of seats in the college. Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya admission to most of the undergraduate and postgraduate programmes is offered on the basis of marks scored in the Common University Entrance Test.Candidates can choose the type of admission they are seeking, which can be through one of the following:Type 1 - Through CUETType 2 - Through Department level TestType 3 - Through merit in the qualifying examination.The application fee for all types of admissions is INR 1,550.

overview_faqs.question: Is Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Takshashila a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: In India, Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya (DAVV) Takshashila is recognised as a respectable university. The college is renowned for offering high-quality academic programs, especially in subjects like humanities, management, and commerce. It provides a supportive learning atmosphere with knowledgeable instructors committed to the growth and research of its students. Libraries, labs, and extracurricular activities are among the contemporary amenities on campus that support a well-rounded educational experience. Students are drawn to DAVV Takshashila because of its excellent placement record and the numerous organisations that visit for recruitment. All things considered, DAVV Takshashila is a wonderful option for students looking for high-quality education and job possibilities because of its academic rigour, teaching knowledge, and placement opportunities.

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee for the B.Tech. program at Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Takshashila?
overview_faqs.answer: To be eligible for admission to the B.Tech. program at Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Takshashila, a candidate must have qualified in the 10+2 examination and appeared in the IIT-JEE examination.The application fee for the B.Tech. program at Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Takshashila is INR 750 per program. For SC/ST candidates of M.P. domicile, the fee is INR 400 per program.The application fee can be paid online through mponline.gov.in. For other programs, the application form must be submitted to the respective teaching department along with a demand draft drawn in favor of “Registrar, D.A.V.V., Indore”.

overview_faqs.question: Can Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus is a reputed institute for M.Phil, UG Diploma, B.Tech, B.A., M.A., M.E./M.Tech, B.Ed, M.Ed, Certificate, PG Diploma, M.P.Ed, MBA/PGDM, B.Lib.I.Sc., B.P.Ed, LL.M. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Law, Hospitality & Travel, Engineering, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Teaching & Education, Humanities & Social Sciences, Beauty & Fitness, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Mass Communication & Media, Banking, Finance & Insurance, Medicine & Health Sciences, Design, Science, Accounting & Commerce. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus has a review rating of 4.1 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.1 on campuslife, 4.1 on placements, 4.1 on faculty and 3.7 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: DAVV Indore is a good college.

content.Placements: Many companies come for placements. Top companies from Indore also come for placements. The DAVV Placement Cell conducts exams for particular companies. Around 70 to 80 percent of students get placed with good packages. In 2026, the average package at Infosys is 3.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Boys’ and girls’ hostels are available with proper hygiene. The boys’ hostel closes at 11 PM, and the girls’ hostel closes at 9 PM. Two students share one room. Each room has an almirah, table, chair, and internet connection.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. + M. Tech. in IT - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: My life at the IET DAVV Indore (Madhya Pradesh).

content.Placements: I am currently in the 1st semester, so I don't know too much about placements, but I can say that placements are not too good in our college as compared to NITs and IIITs. The highest package offered is 39 LPA, which was offered in the year 2023. The average package offered is around 6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, a library, etc., are available.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are extraordinary. They have a good sense of humour, so they can make us laugh. They do not insult anyone to make us laugh. They are just good human beings. There are 4 exams per semester, 3 MSTs, and one end-semester exam. The best of 2 out of 3 will be taken as a result of MST. I am currently in the first semester of the Information Technology course. My course is about the IT sector, and I know the value of that. Our faculty members are good at teaching and friendly with students like us who didn't get the lecture the first time.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the food in the hostel.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is 8 CGPA or more. No backlogs. The highest package is 28 LPA, the lowest package is 3 LPA-4 LPA, and the average package is 7 LPA- 8 LPA. Companies are Wipro, Infosys, and TCS. The percentage of students is about 8 CGPA, and the company is Accenture.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi of the hostel network is good. Labs are also outstanding, but the lectures are minimal. My suggestion is that the food in the hostel and the water are not good, so I do not eat there. Medical facilities are not available in the college. These are outside the college. I have no idea about sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is a good government college. I got decent marks in JEE Main.

content.Placements: This course is new, and in this college, this is the first year of this course. Overall, across all CS branches, the highest package offered is 57 LPA. The average package ranges from 10-12 LPA. Microsoft, Google India, Infosys, Wipro, Amazon, Adobe, etc., are the main companies that came for placements. 70 percent of students got internships from this course in small tech companies. Senior and junior software engineer roles are offered in this course.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus area is good and huge. The college campus is covered with many trees and plants, and it seems like college is in the jungle. Wi-Fi, labs, library, and all good facilities are available in the college for students. Mason canteen food is acceptable. College is directly connected with Indore Icchapur Highway. Sports and games happen in college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Ground-level information of DAVV.

content.Placements: Above 60 percent of students got placed from every batch every year, and the remaining 40 percent are trying to find off-campus placement, but they don't get any support from the college. 1.5 LPA to 20 LPA is the package offered, and the average is 5 LPA to 8 LPA. TCS and Infosys are recruiting companies. 25 percent of students got internships in mostly TCS and Infosys. Web developer is the role offered.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is too good, but cleanliness is average, and all are available. The hostel is pretty nice, but the food quality is, as expected, average and sometimes below average. Medical facilities are available, and a canteen too, but the sports are rarely played.

The college offers programmes at UG in the streams of Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design, Mass Communication and Media, Law, Humanities and Social Sciences, Science, Teaching and Education, Beauty and Fitness, Banking and Finance and Insurance. Candidates need to visit the official website to apply for Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus admission. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.

faqs.question: Is Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Takshashila hard to get?
faqs.answer: Taking admission into Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Takshashila is a competitive task, it's difficulty level varies on several aspects:Eligibility criteria: The university has a specific eligibility criteria for each course which includes minimum marks and percentage with respect to each courseEntrance exam: The university offers some courses which requires a specific entrance exam namely CUET, GATE , CMAT which is tough in qualifyingCompetition: The university itself is reputed, enabling more num

faqs.question: Can I get direct admissions at Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus?
faqs.answer: Students can not get direct admissions at Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus. Admissions to engineering courses are based on the score of JEE Mains followd by DTE Madhya Pradesh Councelling. Admissions to programmes like BA, BSc, BCA, BCom, etc., are offered on the basis of CUET scores. For the management programmes like MBA, CET scores are considered.

faqs.question: Is application fee refundable at Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus?
faqs.answer: Filling the application form is the first & important step for taking admissions at the university. The application fee needs to be paid at the last step of the form. The fee is different for different streams, years and categories. This application fee is not generally refundable. Once you have paid the application fee you cannot ask for refund even if you don't want to move further with the application process.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Takshashila?
faqs.answer: No, Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya does not give direct admission to the students. Admission to various courses is based on merit and scores of entrance exams. Candidates need to write the CUET entrance exam which is conducted by the NTA. After clearing the CUET entrance exam, students may get a provisional allotment of seats in the college. Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya admission to most of the undergraduate and postgraduate programmes is offered on the basis of marks scored in the Common University Entrance Test.Candidates can choose the type of admission they are seeking, which can be through one of the following:Type 1 - Through CUETType 2 - Through Department level TestType 3 - Through merit in the qualifying examination.The application fee for all types of admissions is INR 1,550.

hostel_campus.college_name: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya

reviews.review_heading: DAVV Indore is a good college.
reviews.review_text: Boys’ and girls’ hostels are available with proper hygiene. The boys’ hostel closes at 11 PM, and the girls’ hostel closes at 9 PM. Two students share one room. Each room has an almirah, table, chair, and internet connection.

reviews.review_heading: My life at the IET DAVV Indore (Madhya Pradesh).
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, a library, etc., are available.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the food in the hostel.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi of the hostel network is good. Labs are also outstanding, but the lectures are minimal. My suggestion is that the food in the hostel and the water are not good, so I do not eat there. Medical facilities are not available in the college. These are outside the college.  I have no idea about sports.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good government college. I got decent marks in JEE Main.
reviews.review_text: The college campus area is good and huge. The college campus is covered with many trees and plants, and it seems like college is in the jungle. Wi-Fi, labs, library, and all good facilities are available in the college for students. Mason canteen food is acceptable. College is directly connected with Indore Icchapur Highway. Sports and games happen in college.

reviews.review_heading: Ground-level information of DAVV.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is too good, but cleanliness is average, and all are available. The hostel is pretty nice, but the food quality is, as expected, average and sometimes below average. Medical facilities are available, and a canteen too, but the sports are rarely played.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, college is good, especially for the core. Mechanical is best for core.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good in terms of infrastructure. All students live like a family. A single room is allotted for the final year. Wi-Fi facility is available on campus. VLSI lab for Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering. Mess is also available. Medical facilities are also good. For sports, you have to go to the main campus.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of high ROI.
reviews.review_text: Faculty isn't good as we expected. Rather than Wi-Fi, labs and library are more than good. Food quality is the worst I have seen, no sports and medical facilities, and no games have been played yet. The hostel warden is also very rude towards students regarding mess food and health issues.

reviews.review_heading: Rude faculty, no proper water coolers, and no digital screens.
reviews.review_text: Ragging cases are reported. There are not sufficient rooms for students, so some students live in rented PG flats. Food is not included in the hostel fee. There is no proper equipment and playground facilities on the IET DAVV campus. Wi-Fi passwords are provided at the end of the semester. There is no proper mobile network or Wi-Fi connectivity in the college. There are no smart classrooms, projectors, or LED screens in classrooms. Computer labs are available, but faculty does not take students ...

reviews.review_heading: It has decent infrastructure. It offers quality education with a good placement rate.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on the campus. A decent library is provided with the availability of books in all courses. The quality of food provided is also decent in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are available, and basic medicines are available in each department block.

reviews.review_heading: It is really good in all respects except for the low infrastructure and hostels.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are not good. The mess is also not good. Wi-Fi is okay in many rooms. The library is good with a big reading area and a lot of books. There are no medical facilities in the hostel because the college is in the centre of the city. There are no sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is good government college strong placement in CSE, IT, ECE ROI is very good.
reviews.review_text: Above average infrastructure, decent classroom, lab, library, good Wi-Fi facility, big campus full of greenery hostels are basic. Mess food is very poor, campus life is simple not very luxuries not more comfort are there. Every month mst are held I did say it is solid and reliable.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, second best college in Madhya Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of CSE department at my college is decent. We have Wi-Fi facility in every department of our college and its library, we have updated computer labs and access to a large central library. Hostel facilities are average, rooms are simple but livable, and the mess food is okay, though great. The campus has basic medical facilities, a sports ground, and areas for games.

reviews.review_heading: Best in Indore for the IT branch. Its most famous in Indore for its huge campus.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for you in the IET department on the bypass are available in libraries. Classroom is very neat and clean. The facilities are available in the hostel, just like a water cooler, a mess canteen, Wi-Fi, and a very clean environment.

reviews.review_heading: School of computer science and information technology, DAVV, Indore.
reviews.review_text: I would say the infrastructure is good because it contains big grounds, an athletics ground, a basketball court, a volleyball court, a tennis court, and cricket grounds. And whole sports are just like a dream university, and for a sports person, it's the best place for this amount.

reviews.review_heading: Short review about SCSIT.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. The college provides a good campus with greenery all around. The labs are okay, not the best, they are average. The Wi-Fi of the college is good for basic tasks, and the library has all the essential books you need during your academic period.

Pt. Jawahar Lal Nehru Memorial Medical College, Raipur M.Ch. cutoff 2025 ranged between 527 and 3473 for the General category under the AI quota. With a lowest cutoff rank of 527, M.Ch. in Surgical Oncology turned out to be the most competitive specialisation for admission.
Students not eligible for this specialisation can also consider M.Ch. in Neuro Surgery with a lenient first-round cutoff rank of for admission.
