reviews.review_heading: Absolutely marvelous college CG top state medical college.
reviews.review_text: All basic facilities are available. It has an auditorium, all labs, library, canteen, and hostel. We have two dissection halls. We have hematology lab, human lab, Biochemistry UG lab, advanced research laboratory, chemistry lab, microbiology lab, pathology lab, pharmacology lab, and FMT autopsy room. All 19 branches are present at hospital.

reviews.review_heading: Best medical college in the state.
reviews.review_text: LH are good, the library is nice, the ground is small, not suitable for playing, the location of the college is great, the railway station is 0.8 km from the college, the connectivity is nice, we have a very good indoor hall where the badminton court, tennis table etc. Are provided!

reviews.review_heading: It is a dream college for many students.
reviews.review_text: Our college is in good condition. The hostel fee is about Rs. 4000 per year. It is affordable. The food provided by the mess is also good. We have three labs for physiology, biochemistry, and anatomy. All new technologies are available at our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in terms of education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. Our college provides a separate hostel for boys and girls. We have a library and huge lecture halls. All labs and museums are well-managed. All lecture rooms are air-conditioned. Lifts are available in every building.

reviews.review_heading: The best Medical College in Raipur.
reviews.review_text: The medical college, the labs and infrastructure itself is quite up to date with respect to a normal medical college, but the hostels are subpar. The hospital is one of the largest ones in Raipur in Chhattisgarh and as super speciality programs running the college conducts early festival activities.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the placements and internships.
reviews.review_text: There are 7 hostels here, and different hostels are available for girls, boys, interns and postgraduate students. Hygienic food is served in the mess, and about 10 to 11 messes are available. There is also an indoor stadium, and football ground and a basketball court are being constructed. There are advanced labs with lab assistants and digital classrooms. But there is no Wi-Fi, which is disappointing.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best medical college in Chhattisgarh.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure has become good now. There are a new library and a new building made within the campus which is very good. A new auditorium has been established which is India's biggest auditorium that any medical college have. Boys hostels are not so good which are also under construction.

reviews.review_heading: Best faculty with good infrastructure and high practical experience in the hospital.
reviews.review_text: All the classrooms in our medical college are modernized with air conditioning. We have a huge library, and all the labs are separate with all the necessary materials. Our medical college has the highest number of cadavers in the whole of Chhattisgarh. The food quality is excellent, and the hostels are well-equipped with all the facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: The library is available. The lecture hall and practical labs are available. The hostel is good. The canteen and mess are good. Medical facilities are available. Indoor and outdoor games are good. Sports and games are played here.

reviews.review_heading: It's a very good college. The teachers and other staff was awesome.
reviews.review_text: They're all fantastic. The food is good. There are organised sports games all year. The infrastructure is good. There are separate departments for every subject. The food in the mess is good, and the canteen food is also good. The medical facility is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best medical college of Chhattisgarh, and teachers and practical knowledge are the best.
reviews.review_text: We have a library in our college which also have Wi-Fi. Wi-Fi is only available in the library but not on the whole campus. We have many practical labs, and there are 19 subjects in our course, so there is each lab for our different subjects. Classrooms are normal and air-conditioned. However, some of the air-conditioners work, and some won't. Hostel facilities are available. The mess was average, but comparatively, as an outside mess, our hostel mess is good and affordable. Canteen is also avai...

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sree Gokulam Medical College.

review_content.Placements: Our college conducts the best classes. They provide good exposure to clinical affairs, inter equipment, and accessories. All students who have passed the 4th year got placed in the hospital to complete house surgency, with a salary of around Rs. 6,000 per month, which is low compared to government medical colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has well-furnished classrooms. They are equipped with air-conditioners. They provide separate technical assistants for technical support. Our college has a good canteen and a stationery shop. It provides separate hostels for boys and girls. The hostels are good. Our college provides facilities for sports like a football ground, basketball court, and a shuttle court.

review_content.Placements: We have the best in class and good exposure to students in clinical affairs and international equipment and accessories. Patients are there in ample amounts, which helps to build knowledge in all aspects of patient care and management. The maintenance of the hostel is not good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure in terms of hostels and other things is not that good. There is a good playground available. Labs are good but maintenance is really poor. The hostel is neat and tidy with Wi-Fi facilities, and the food is of good quality. The lecture hall is big and has smart class features.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Totally satisfied with the faculty, infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: 1 year of internship is necessary for course completion. The stipend is very low as compared to other colleges. Current stipend is 7000/month. It's a great opportunity to work under different departments and gain hands-on experience and improve our clinical skills. After internship, we can apply for a job as JR, and the expected salary is 4.8 - 9.6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Overall infrastructure is good. It is situated over a vast area of 50 acres with good patient loads and facilities. OP facilities and 24/7 casualty with free Wi-Fi, diagnostic labs, pharmacy, operation theatre, blood bank, and radiodiagnostic department are available in the hospital block. The academic block contains labs, a lecture hall, an auditorium, and a library. A canteen is also there. Separate Men's and Ladies' hostels are there. A and B blocks with 5 floors have larger rooms than C and D blocks. C block has 10 floors. Lift facilities are available. A swimming pool and gym are also there near the hostel. AC will also be provided if needed. The quality of food is average.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college gives the best education and skills.

review_content.Placements: I am currently in my 3rd year. My super seniors got normal jobs in companies. But still, our college management is trying to give the best jobs to the students. 40 percent of students were placed in my college. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest package is 2 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The best thing about my college is the hostel. They provide two different types of food, like northern and southern style food. I have tried both types of food, but North-style food is better than South-style. I can give 4 stars out of 5 stars to my college hostel facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Colorful campus and opportunity to grow

review_content.Placements: I joined in September. In our class there are 60 students and many other sections. I have heard from seniors that the average package is around 3 to 4 LPA. Mostly small and midfirm companies are coming and intership is not so mandatory. It mostly will depend on our skills and our willingness to learn.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-fi is available and a full network. Computer labs are there for learning communication and presentation. Classrooms have AC and best seats to attend classes. I am not a hosteler but I have eaten once. I did not like it so much. Good enough to live. Sports facilities are the best. You can play basketball cricket tennis and coaches are there. A small hospital is there for small health issues.

review_summary.college_name: Centurion University of Technology and Management, Paralakhemundi Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: College is good, but the infrastructure needs to be improved.

content.Placements: About 100 percent of the seats were occupied by my batch this year. The highest package offered is 6.5 LPA (average) and the lowest is 3.6 LPA. I am a fresher, so I do not know anything about other questions. The package thing was recommended by a senior. Overall, it is good.
content.Infrastructure: There is a digital classroom with internet service. Quality is good, but not satisfactory. Food quality is average. Sports and games are good. There is no Wi-Fi on my campus. There is no proper management. The management needs to improve, especially the low-ranking staff.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Centurion University review.

content.Placements: The placement in our course was the best among all courses. The placement percentage was around 85–90 percent. The highest package was also secured by our course only, i.e., 22 LPA. The average package was around 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Accenture, Deloitte, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Wi-Fi facilities, a library, and modern classrooms were available. Computer labs, laboratories, and workshops were well equipped with instruments. Hostel quality was also good. Sports and games were encouraged by the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Our college gives the best education and skills.

content.Placements: I am currently in my 3rd year. My super seniors got normal jobs in companies. But still, our college management is trying to give the best jobs to the students. 40 percent of students were placed in my college. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest package is 2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The best thing about my college is the hostel. They provide two different types of food, like northern and southern style food. I have tried both types of food, but North-style food is better than South-style. I can give 4 stars out of 5 stars to my college hostel facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Colorful campus and opportunity to grow

content.Placements: I joined in September. In our class there are 60 students and many other sections. I have heard from seniors that the average package is around 3 to 4 LPA. Mostly small and midfirm companies are coming and intership is not so mandatory. It mostly will depend on our skills and our willingness to learn.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-fi is available and a full network. Computer labs are there for learning communication and presentation. Classrooms have AC and best seats to attend classes. I am not a hosteler but I have eaten once. I did not like it so much. Good enough to live. Sports facilities are the best. You can play basketball cricket tennis and coaches are there. A small hospital is there for small health issues.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good placements and fantastic infrastructure, but the hostel mess food is just average.

content.Placements: For our BBA batch, the placement rate is quite high, officially around 90%. The salary packages have a wide range. The highest package goes up to 13.60 LPA. The median package is 4.00 LPA. On average, most students receive offers between 2.5 LPA and 3.5 LPA, with the lowest packages being around 1.5 LPA. Our top recruiting companies include major banks like ICICI, HDFC, and Axis Bank. As well as IT companies like Accenture, Wipro, and Cognizant. Almost everyone, 60-100 percent, manages to get an internship as it is a key part of our course.

admission_overview.college_name: Centurion University of Technology and Management, Paralakhemundi Course Admissions 2025: Eligibility, Selection Process & Dates

paragraphs: Centurion University Paralakhemundi admission 2024is online and offline. Centurion University of Technology and Management (CUTM), through eight schools, offers UG, PG, and other courses to students across Engineering, Management, Science, and other streams. Admission to various UG, PG, and other courses is based on merit and scores secured in entrance exams. At the UG level,Centurion University Paralakhemundioffers four-year BTech, four-year BSc, three-year BCA, BBA, and other courses to students.

At the PG level, the university offers two-year MBA, MSc, and other courses to students. To get admission to any courses students are required to complete the eligibility and selection criteria set by the college for admission. Want to know more about Centurion University Paralakhemundi admission, along with course-wise eligibility, selection criteria, seat intake, fees and admission process:

Students seeking admission are advised to check the course-specific eligibility conditions before applying. The final seat allotment is done only for students who meet eligibility and selection criteria. To confirm admission, selected candidates have to pay some amount of the course fees at the time of admission. The table presentsCenturion University Paralakhemundi coursesalong with course eligibility and selection criteria:
Eligibility

CUEE + Counselling

CUEE BPharm+ Counselling

Centurion University Paralakhemundi feeis a sum of multiple components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Some of the fee components like caution deposit are one-time paid while tuition fee is paid annually. Coming to affordability is one of the strong reasons why many don't opt for a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships has made education accessible. However, the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. Check below the total tuition fee, and average package for top Centurion University Paralakhemundi courses:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Centurion University Paralakhemundi seat intakevaries course-wise. Candidates are offered seats based on their merit. Once the seat is allotted, candidates are required to pay the course fee to confirm their admission. Below is the intake for top Centurion University Paralakhemundi courses:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Centurion University follows a process for admissions to its various courses. Each aspirant goes through the admission stages till the final seat allotment. Largely, the admission process involves an application process, entrance examination, counselling, and admission confirmation. Details on each of these admission stages are provided below for a better understanding of the students:
STEP 1: Centurion University Paralakhemundi Application Process2024

Candidates willing to get admission to Centurion University can apply forCUEEfrom the official website with an option to pay and submit the form online or pay and submit the form offline. The aspirants opting for the online application method are required to visit the official website of the University(www.cutm.ac.in).

After the completion of registration, the University will conduct the CUEE exam. Applicants are required to appear for the exam at the notified test centre. Qualified applicants will be called up to take provisional admission by depositing a minimum admission fee via cash/DD at the University campus or online on the website.
STEP 2: Shortlisting Students

Centurion University Entrance Examination (CUEE) is conducted by Centurion University, Odisha for admissions to various undergraduate and postgraduate courses. The online remote-proctored test is a 3-hour long exam. The students with a valid score and meeting the cutoff are called for the next round of admission. For MTech courses, national-level exams, andGATEscores are accepted for shortlisting students.
STEP 3: Counselling

Candidates who score greater than or equal to the cutoff marks in the entrance examination have to participate in theCUEE counsellingprocess for admissions. The counselling is conducted in offline mode. The selected students have to report to the counselling venue and fill out their preferred courses. The seat allotment is done based on the candidate's merit, preference and availability of seats.
STEP 4: Admission Fee Payment & Seat Confirmation
After the final seat allotments, selected students can pay some amount of the admission fee and confirm their seats. The amount required to be paid can be confirmed by the university officials.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Centurion University of Technology and Management, Balasore CampusReviewed on 30 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is good, but the infrastructure needs to be improved.
reviews.review_text: There is a digital classroom with internet service. Quality is good, but not satisfactory. Food quality is average. Sports and games are good. There is no Wi-Fi on my campus. There is no proper management. The management needs to improve, especially the low-ranking staff.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bhubaneswar CampusReviewed on 30 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Centurion University review.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Wi-Fi facilities, a library, and modern classrooms were available. Computer labs, laboratories, and workshops were well equipped with instruments. Hostel quality was also good. Sports and games were encouraged by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college gives the best education and skills.
reviews.review_text: The best thing about my college is the hostel. They provide two different types of food, like northern and southern style food. I have tried both types of food, but North-style food is better than South-style. I can give 4 stars out of 5 stars to my college hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Colorful campus and opportunity to grow
reviews.review_text: Wi-fi is available and a full network. Computer labs are there for learning communication and presentation. Classrooms have AC and best seats to attend classes. I am not a hosteler but I have eaten once. I did not like it so much. Good enough to live. Sports facilities are the best. You can play basketball cricket tennis and coaches are there. A small hospital is there for small health issues.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bhubaneswar CampusReviewed on 15 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements and fantastic infrastructure, but the hostel mess food is just average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our BBA course is excellent. All are smart classrooms with projectors, smart boards, and reliable Wi-Fi. The entire campus, including the hostels and library, is Wi-Fi enabled. The central library is very large. It has a great collection of books and digital resources. The hostels are also well-maintained, with separate ones for boys and girls. Students can choose between AC and non-AC rooms.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bhubaneswar CampusReviewed on 14 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: You will enjoy the college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very good, and I recommend you visit it as there are lots of places like the butterfly garden, gram tarang, etc. Wi-Fi is here, but don't rely on it as they have less network speed. The library is here, but it doesn't have new books, all are old. The hostel is very bad, I heard it, but I don't know that much because I am a day scholar.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at CUTM - Paralakhemundi.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good, especially the library, which is very large and consists of 1000s of books, and it is environmentally friendly. The hostel is pretty decent, and can adjust. Food quality is also okay. Sports infrastructure is very good, but they will get very little time to play.

reviews.review_heading: Sneak peak into Agriculture.
reviews.review_text: Centurion University has a well-developed academic infrastructure. Lecture halls and classrooms are spacious, with many being smart classrooms, equipped with projectors, digital boards, and high-speed Wi-Fi covering nearly the entire campus. The university has separate hostels for boys and girls, including AC hostels, with multiple mess halls. Rooms are shared (often 3-5 students), with attached bathroom in many hostels.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bhubaneswar CampusReviewed on 8 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Also a very good college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is the best. There are many types in our college. A big ground, a volleyball court, a gym area, and a swimming pool are available in the college. The classroom is completely AC and very spacious.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bhubaneswar CampusReviewed on 17 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied with the college. Infrastructure, facilities, faculty members, and all are good.
reviews.review_text: Every possible facility is available in the college as well as the hostel. Food is good, Wi-Fi was available, and the Lab was also very useful. They also have an option available of AC luxury in a hostel that was value for money. I also chose the luxury one, and all the facilities were good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bhubaneswar CampusReviewed on 23 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is recognized as one of the best skill institutions in Odisha.
reviews.review_text: College is set in a peaceful and green environment, making it a pleasant place to study. The hostels are well-maintained, with spacious rooms and all necessary facilities provided. Hostel wardens are also very cooperative and ensure students feel comfortable.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bhubaneswar CampusReviewed on 14 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members and better jobs are provided by our college.
reviews.review_text: Our department boasted well-equipped laboratories, smart classrooms, fast Wi-Fi, and access to a huge library. The hostel provided neat rooms, hygienic mess, and 24x7 medical attention. There are cricket, football, and indoor games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied with the placement cell in 2024-2025.
reviews.review_text: College has good buildings and infrastructure, but class have no Wi-Fi facilities. There is a central library that has Wi-Fi support. There is a dispenser for first aid support. Facilities to play cricket, basketball, volleyball, and football are available. Hostel rooms are decent, but the mess food is not worth it.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Classrooms are highly maintained, and Wi-fi is available. The library is also provided in our college. The college hostels are good, but the food quality in the mess is not good. In the CUTM, they have a big sports complex.

Different types of hostels are available; if you want air-conditioned rooms, they are available, and attached bathrooms are also an option.

college_info.college_name: Centurion University of Technology and Management, Paralakhemundi Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bhubaneswar offers scholarships based on prior academic record during admission, as well as semester-wise performance for subsequent years. Candidates from different boards of education receive a pre-defined percentage of scholarship on their fees. The scholarship percentage is based on the scores obtained in the previous academic level. From the second year onwards, candidates must maintain a minimum of 8.0 CGPA in their semester exams, along with a minimum of 80% attendance, to continue with their scholarship.
In addition to these scholarships, Centurion University also offers various scholarships to reserved and minority category students. Some of the scholarships available are:

- PRERANA post-matric scholarship for SC/ST/OBC and SEBC District Welfare Office (Odisha)- Minority scholarship from the District Welfare Office (Odisha)- National scholarship- Jindal Foundation scholarship (Sitaram Jindal)- Times of India scholarship- Ministry of Human Development (DHE) New Delhi- Bihar Welfare (Post-Matric) SC/ST/OBC and Minority- BEML scholarship (SC & ST)- FAEA scholarship (SC & ST)- Bihar Welfare (Technical Stipend)- E-KALYAN scholarship offered by Jharkhand State Welfare Department- Departmental/ Official scholarship from East Coast Railway/ CRPF/ Central Schools/ SBI/ Coal India/ Daitari Mines/OMC for their wards.

To get admission to Centurion University Paralakhemundi candidates are required to meet the eligiblity set by the university. The eligibility criteria for MBA is, graduation in ay discipline with CUEE score/rank. Centurion University BBSR offers many specialisation in MBA with the duration of two years in full time mode. Refer the below table for MBA fee at Centurion University Paralakhemundi:

college_info.college_name: Martin Luther Christian University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: A student can pursue these 54 courses as Degree. Martin Luther Christian University offers UG, PG and After 10th courses. Institute enjoys a good reputation for courses like B.Sc., B.A., BOPTM, BCA, BBA, B.Com, BSW, M.A., MPH, MSW, M.Sc., MCA, MBA/PGDM, M.Com, After 10th Diploma, PG Diploma, Certificate, M.Optom., BHMTT, MHMTT in the streams of Medicine & Health Sciences, Science, Humanities & Social Sciences, IT & Software, Animation, Business & Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Hospitality & Travel, Teaching & Education Students can opt courses from these. Over the period, Martin Luther Christian University has gained expertize through its trained and experienced faculty in the fields of Medical Laboratory Technology. Courses offered by Martin Luther Christian University are in the fee range of INR 3,250-436,100 for candidates. The tuition fees for the courses range from INR 3,250-436,100 for all students.

placements.overview:
A student can pursue these 54 courses as Degree. Martin Luther Christian University offers UG, PG and After 10th courses. Institute enjoys a good reputation for courses like B.Sc., B.A., BOPTM, BCA, BBA, B.Com, BSW, M.A., MPH, MSW, M.Sc., MCA, MBA/PGDM, M.Com, After 10th Diploma, PG Diploma, Certificate, M.Optom., BHMTT, MHMTT in the streams of Medicine & Health Sciences, Science, Humanities & Social Sciences, IT & Software, Animation, Business & Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Hospitality & Travel, Teaching & Education Students can opt courses from these. Over the period, Martin Luther Christian University has gained expertize through its trained and experienced faculty in the fields of Medical Laboratory Technology. Courses offered by Martin Luther Christian University are in the fee range of INR 3,250-436,100 for candidates. The tuition fees for the courses range from INR 3,250-436,100 for all students.

Martin Luther Christian University was founded in 2005. It is a private university and is located in Shillong, Meghalaya. Martin Luther Christian University courses are offered to students at the UG, PG and Certificate levels. The institute offers courses in Full Time mode. Martin Luther Christian University offers a total of 54 courses in streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ) and Humanities & Social Sciences. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., M.Sc., MCA and BCA. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Counseling, English, Entrepreneurship, Environmental Geography and Environmental Sciences. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 3,250 to 4,36,100. Apart from this, the Martin Luther Christian University campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

Q. Which courses does Martin Luther Christian University offer?

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The thing I like about Martin Luther Christian University (MLCU) is the relationship.

review_content.Placements: I got to know that the university scheduled placements mainly on Saturdays. Corporates, NGOs, government setups, and private firms came here for hiring students.
review_content.Infrastructure: I rented a PG, it is run by a local owner at Labalang, Shillong, and I paid Rs. 6,350 per month. There were no admission fees. The relation with students was maintained without much pressure from the owner/warden. The owner provided a bed, table and chair. The food menu was not up to our expectations. The standard of the menu was discouraging. Hostel fee was Rs. 72,600 per year.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: My experience in this college .

review_content.Placements: Good internship opportunities are provided to students; contacts of different companies are arranged, and internships in different companies are provided to students with good stipends. The job placement is very good and genuine. Companies like ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, Axis Bank, TCS, and JP Morgan came here. Packages are attractive, like 3.5 LPA for entry-level roles. The placement is good in terms of good management and correlation between the company and students. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, and the average is 3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The course curriculum was exhaustive and was adapted to the requirements of the industry. There was a good balance between theory and project-based assessment, which helped students. I was a day scholar, so As a day scholar, I can't speak about the hostel facilities, but the on-campus hostel meant residents had an advantage for timely lecture attendance. The food was decent, and Sundays were typically fest days. I often spent time with friends who were hostel residents.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The food was very awesome.

review_content.Placements: After the fourth trimester, you are eligible to sit in placement; after the 3rd trimester, you have to undergo a summary internship program. The companies that visited our college include Deloitte, Flipkart, Amazon, etc. The highest average package is 6 Lacs, and 100% placement is from the college only.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no university-attached hostel. Although multiple hostels and PGs are available in and around the campus, the available hostel accommodation is well-known for its high-quality lodging and easy access to the campus. Hostel Fee: INR 70,000 per year.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Social Work (MSW) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: College helps in being a good communicator, presenter, critical thinking ability, researcher, etc.

review_content.Placements: Around 52% of the students got placed in our course. The most recruiting organisation for our course was NGO. Almost 100% of students in our university got internships from college. Students get placed in different organisations both non-government and government organisations. Communicator, motivator, facilitator, educator, research, and presenter are roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: A good Wi-Fi connection is provided, and we have huge classrooms which include monitors, whiteboards, and different chart works that include the ethics and values of the university. The canteen is of good quality. There are different sports and games included where students can take part according to their comfort.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Psychology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Martin Luther Christian University.

review_content.Placements: Almost 100% of the students from our course got placed. In our course, the highest salary package offered was 4 LPA, the lowest salary package offered was 2 LPA and the average salary package offered was 3 LPA. The top recruiting company of our college is Filter Wills. Almost 100% of the students got an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are two buildings, and one is for psychology and tourism. The psychology department has 2 big classrooms and a laboratory along with one staff room. Classrooms and labs are average, but benches are not enough as compared to students. Boards are not placed properly.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The best college from my experience.

review_content.Placements: Students look for online internships and industry training to gain more exposure and experience. Most of the students from our course got placed. In our course, the highest salary package offered was 4 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 2 LPA. The average salary package offered was 3 LPA. I got to know that the university schedules placement mainly on Saturdays. Corporates, NGOs, government set-ups, private firms, etc., come here to hire students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The course curriculum was good. It covers the basics of management, and also it gives in-depth knowledge of management accompanied by experiential learning. It was designed in such a way that it offered a platform to acquire both hard and soft skills. At an affordable cost of 68,400 per year, a girl student could avail the hostel facility, and a boy could avail boys hostel facility at Rs 60,000 per year. Students preferred the college hostel facility over any other accommodation options.

reviews.review_text: There is no university-attached hostel. Although multiple hostels and PGs are available in and around the campus, the available hostel accommodation is well-known for its high-quality lodging and easy access to the campus. Hostel Fee: INR 70,000 per year.

reviews.review_heading: College helps in being a good communicator, presenter, critical thinking ability, researcher, etc.
reviews.review_text: A good Wi-Fi connection is provided, and we have huge classrooms which include monitors, whiteboards, and different chart works that include the ethics and values of the university. The canteen is of good quality. There are different sports and games included where students can take part according to their comfort.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Martin Luther Christian University.
reviews.review_text: There are two buildings, and one is for psychology and tourism. The psychology department has 2 big classrooms and a laboratory along with one staff room. Classrooms and labs are average, but benches are not enough as compared to students. Boards are not placed properly.

reviews.review_heading: The best college from my experience.
reviews.review_text: The course curriculum was good. It covers the basics of management, and also it gives in-depth knowledge of management accompanied by experiential learning. It was designed in such a way that it offered a platform to acquire both hard and soft skills. At an affordable cost of 68,400 per year, a girl student could avail the hostel facility, and a boy could avail boys hostel facility at Rs 60,000 per year. Students preferred the college hostel facility over any other accommodation options.

reviews.review_heading: This university is amazing.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, computer labs with necessary software, and classrooms equipped with projectors are available. The library offers a collection of books and journals. Hostels provide basic amenities, shared rooms, and varying food quality. Medical facilities include health check-ups and emergency services. Additionally, various sports facilities are present.
